name: 强酸箭
desc: 一支闪烁着微光的绿色箭矢射向射程内的目标并在酸液喷溅中爆裂。对目标进行一次远程法术攻击。命中时，目标立即受到4d4强酸伤害，并在其下个回合结束时再受到2d4强酸伤害。未命中时，箭矢溅射出的酸液只造成初始伤害的一半，且目标在其下个回合结束时不会受到伤害。
higher_level: 当你使用3环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害（包括初始伤害和后续伤害）每比2环高1环就增加1d4。
material: 大黄叶粉末和一条蝰蛇的胃。
desc_en: A shimmering green arrow streaks toward a target within range and bursts in a spray of acid. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 4d4 acid damage immediately and 2d4 acid damage at the end of its next turn. On a miss, the arrow splashes the target with acid for half as much of the initial damage and no damage at the end of its next turn.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the damage (both initial and later) increases by 1d4 for each slot level above 2nd.
material_en: Powdered rhubarb leaf and an adder's stomach.

name: 酸液飞溅
desc: 你投掷出一颗酸液泡。选择射程内的一个生物，或者选择射程内且彼此相距5尺内的两个生物。目标必须成功通过一次敏捷豁免，否则受到1d6强酸伤害。
当你达到5级时，该法术的伤害增加1d6（变为2d6），11级时增加2d6（变为3d6），17级时增加3d6（变为4d6）。
desc_en: You hurl a bubble of acid. Choose one creature within range, or choose two creatures within range that are within 5 feet of each other. A target must succeed on a dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 acid damage.
This spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you reach 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

name: 援助术
desc: 你的法术用坚韧和决心强化你的盟友。选择射程内最多三个生物。在持续时间内，每个目标的生命值上限和当前生命值都增加5点。
higher_level: 当你使用3环或更高法术位施放该法术时，目标的生命值每比2环高1环就额外增加5点。
material: 一小条白色布料。
desc_en: Your spell bolsters your allies with toughness and resolve. Choose up to three creatures within range. Each target's hit point maximum and current hit points increase by 5 for the duration.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, a target's hit points increase by an additional 5 for each slot level above 2nd.
material_en: A tiny strip of white cloth.

name: 警报术
desc: 你设置一个警报来防范不速之客。选择一扇门、一扇窗或射程内一个不超过20尺立方的区域。直到法术结束，每当一个微型或更大的生物触碰或进入被守护的区域时，警报就会提醒你。当你施放该法术时，你可以指定不会触发警报的生物。你还可以选择警报是精神性的还是可听见的。
精神警报会在你脑海中发出一声提示音，前提是你在被守护区域1英里范围内。如果你正在睡觉，这声提示会唤醒你。
可听见的警报会在60尺范围内产生手铃的声音，持续10秒。
material: 一个小铃铛和一小段精致的银线。
desc_en: You set an alarm against unwanted intrusion. Choose a door, a window, or an area within range that is no larger than a 20-foot cube. Until the spell ends, an alarm alerts you whenever a Tiny or larger creature touches or enters the warded area. When you cast the spell, you can designate creatures that won't set off the alarm. You also choose whether the alarm is mental or audible.
A mental alarm alerts you with a ping in your mind if you are within 1 mile of the warded area. This ping awakens you if you are sleeping.
An audible alarm produces the sound of a hand bell for 10 seconds within 60 feet.
material_en: A tiny bell and a piece of fine silver wire.

name: 变身术
desc: 你变化成不同的形态。当你施放该法术时，选择以下选项之一，其效果持续到法术结束。在法术持续期间，你可以用一个动作结束一个选项并获得另一个选项的好处。
***水生适应。***你的身体适应水生环境，长出鳃并且在指间长出蹼。你可以在水下呼吸，并获得等于你步行速度的游泳速度。
***改变外貌。***你改变你的外貌。你决定自己看起来像什么，包括身高、体重、面部特征、声音、头发长度、颜色和显著特征（如果有）。你可以让自己看起来像另一个种族的成员，但你的数据不会改变。你也不能看起来像不同体型的生物，你的基本形状保持不变；例如，如果你是两足生物，你不能用此法术变成四足生物。在法术持续期间，你可以随时使用你的动作再次以这种方式改变你的外貌。
***天生武器。***你长出爪子、尖牙、棘刺、角或其他你选择的天生武器。你的徒手打击造成1d6钝击、穿刺或挥砍伤害（根据你选择的天生武器），并且你熟练使用你的徒手打击。此外，该天生武器视为魔法武器，你在使用它进行的攻击和伤害检定上具有+1加值。
desc_en: You assume a different form. When you cast the spell, choose one of the following options, the effects of which last for the duration of the spell. While the spell lasts, you can end one option as an action to gain the benefits of a different one.

***Aquatic Adaptation.*** You adapt your body to an aquatic environment, sprouting gills and growing webbing between your fingers. You can breathe underwater and gain a swimming speed equal to your walking speed.

***Change Appearance.*** You transform your appearance. You decide what you look like, including your height, weight, facial features, sound of your voice, hair length, coloration, and distinguishing characteristics, if any. You can make yourself appear as a member of another race, though none of your statistics change. You also can't appear as a creature of a different size than you, and your basic shape stays the same; if you're bipedal, you can't use this spell to become quadrupedal, for instance. At any time for the duration of the spell, you can use your action to change your appearance in this way again.

***Natural Weapons.*** You grow claws, fangs, spines, horns, or a different natural weapon of your choice. Your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage, as appropriate to the natural weapon you chose, and you are proficient with your unarmed strikes. Finally, the natural weapon is magic and you have a +1 bonus to the attack and damage rolls you make using it.

name: 动物交友
desc: 该法术让你说服一只野兽你对其没有恶意。选择一只你能看见的射程内的野兽。它必须能看见你并听见你。如果该野兽的智力为4或更高，该法术失败。否则，该野兽必须成功通过一次感知豁免，否则被你魅惑，持续时间为法术持续时间。如果你或你的一个同伴伤害了目标，法术结束。
material: 一小块食物。
desc_en: This spell lets you convince a beast that you mean it no harm. Choose a beast that you can see within range. It must see and hear you. If the beast's Intelligence is 4 or higher, the spell fails. Otherwise, the beast must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the spell's duration. If you or one of your companions harms the target, the spells ends.
material_en: A morsel of food.

name: 动物信使
desc: 通过该法术，你使用一只动物来传递信息。选择一只你能看见的射程内的微型野兽，例如松鼠、蓝松鸦或蝙蝠。你指定一个你曾经去过的地点，以及一个符合一般描述的收件人，例如"穿着城镇守卫制服的男人或女人"或"戴着尖帽子的红发矮人"。你还说出最多25个字的信息。目标野兽在法术持续时间内向指定地点移动，飞行信使每24小时前进约50英里，其他动物则为25英里。
当信使到达时，它会将你描述的信息传递给符合你描述的生物，复制你的声音。信使只会对你描述的那个生物说话。如果信使在法术结束前没有到达目的地，信息就会丢失，野兽会返回你施放该法术的地方。
higher_level: 如果你使用3环或更高法术位施放该法术，法术的持续时间每比2环高1环就增加48小时。
material: 一小块食物。
desc_en: By means of this spell, you use an animal to deliver a message. Choose a Tiny beast you can see within range, such as a squirrel, a blue jay, or a bat. You specify a location, which you must have visited, and a recipient who matches a general description, such as "a man or woman dressed in the uniform of the town guard" or "a red-haired dwarf wearing a pointed hat." You also speak a message of up to twenty-five words. The target beast travels for the duration of the spell toward the specified location, covering about 50 miles per 24 hours for a flying messenger, or 25 miles for other animals.

When the messenger arrives, it delivers your message to the creature that you described, replicating the sound of your voice. The messenger speaks only to a creature matching the description you gave. If the messenger doesn't reach its destination before the spell ends, the message is lost, and the beast makes its way back to where you cast this spell.
higher_level_en: If you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3nd level or higher, the duration of the spell increases by 48 hours for each slot level above 2nd.
material_en: A morsel of food.

name: 动物变形
desc: 你的魔法将其他生物变成野兽。选择射程内你能看见的任意数量的自愿生物。你将每个目标变成挑战等级4或更低的大型或更小的野兽形态。在后续回合中，你可以使用你的动作将受影响的生物变成新的形态。

变形持续法术持续时间，或直到目标降至0生命值或死亡。你可以为每个目标选择不同的形态。目标的游戏数据被所选野兽的数据取代，但目标保留其阵营和智力、感知、魅力分数。目标假设其新形态的生命值，当它恢复其正常形态时，它恢复到变形前的生命值。如果它因为降至0生命值而恢复，任何过量伤害会转移到其正常形态上。只要过量伤害没有将该生物的正常形态降至0生命值，它就不会被击倒。该生物在新形态下可执行的动作受其新形态性质的限制，它不能说话或施法。
目标的装备融入新形态。目标不能激活、持握或以其他方式从其装备中获得任何好处。
desc_en: Your magic turns others into beasts. Choose any number of willing creatures that you can see within range. You transform each target into the form of a Large or smaller beast with a challenge rating of 4 or lower. On subsequent turns, you can use your action to transform affected creatures into new forms.

The transformation lasts for the duration for each target, or until the target drops to 0 hit points or dies. You can choose a different form for each target. A target's game statistics are replaced by the statistics of the chosen beast, though the target retains its alignment and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores. The target assumes the hit points of its new form, and when it reverts to its normal form, it returns to the number of hit points it had before it transformed. If it reverts as a result of dropping to 0 hit points, any excess damage carries over to its normal form. As long as the excess damage doesn't reduce the creature's normal form to 0 hit points, it isn't knocked unconscious. The creature is limited in the actions it can perform by the nature of its new form, and it can't speak or cast spells.
The target's gear melds into the new form. The target can't activate, wield, or otherwise benefit from any of its equipment.

name: 活化死尸
desc: 该法术创造一个不死仆从。选择射程内的一堆骨头或一个中型或小型类人生物的尸体。你的法术赋予目标虚假的生命，将其复活为不死生物。如果你选择的是骨头，目标变成骷髅；如果你选择的是尸体，目标变成僵尸（由DM提供该生物的游戏数据）。
在你的每个回合中，你可以使用一个附赠动作来精神指挥你用此法术创造的任何生物，前提是该生物在60尺范围内（如果你控制多个生物，你可以同时指挥其中任何一个或全部，对每个生物发出相同的命令）。你决定该生物在其下一回合将采取什么动作以及将移动到哪里，或者你可以发出一个一般性命令，例如守卫某个房间或走廊。如果你没有发出命令，该生物只会在被敌对生物攻击时自卫。一旦接到命令，该生物会继续执行该任务直到完成。
该生物在你的控制下维持24小时，之后它将不再服从你给出的任何命令。为了在另一个24小时内维持对该生物的控制，你必须在当前24小时期限结束前再次对该生物施放此法术。这种对该法术的使用会重新确立你对最多四个你用此法术活化的生物的控制，而不是活化一个新的生物。
higher_level: 当你使用4环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你每比3环高1环，就可以额外活化或重新确立控制两个不死生物。每个生物必须来自不同的尸体或骨堆。
material: 一滴血、一块肉和一撮骨粉。
desc_en: This spell creates an undead servant. Choose a pile of bones or a corpse of a Medium or Small humanoid within range. Your spell imbues the target with a foul mimicry of life, raising it as an undead creature. The target becomes a skeleton if you chose bones or a zombie if you chose a corpse (the GM has the creature's game statistics).

On each of your turns, you can use a bonus action to mentally command any creature you made with this spell if the creature is within 60 feet of you (if you control multiple creatures, you can command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what action the creature will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the creature only defends itself against hostile creatures. Once given an order, the creature continues to follow it until its task is complete.

The creature is under your control for 24 hours, after which it stops obeying any command you've given it. To maintain control of the creature for another 24 hours, you must cast this spell on the creature again before the current 24-hour period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to four creatures you have animated with this spell, rather than animating a new one.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, you animate or reassert control over two additional undead creatures for each slot level above 3rd. Each of the creatures must come from a different corpse or pile of bones.
material_en: A drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust.

name: 活化物体
desc: 物体听从你的命令活化起来。选择射程内最多十个未被穿戴或携带的非魔法物体。中型目标算作两个物体，大型目标算作四个物体，巨型目标算作八个物体。你不能活化大于巨型的物体。每个目标活化并成为你控制下的生物，直到法术结束或降至0生命值。
作为附赠动作，你可以精神指挥你用此法术创造的任何生物，前提是该生物在500尺范围内（如果你控制多个生物，你可以同时指挥其中任何一个或全部，对每个生物发出相同的命令）。
##### 活化物体数据
| 体型 | HP | AC | 攻击 | 力量 | 敏捷 |

活化物体是一个构装生物，其AC、生命值、攻击、力量和敏捷由其体型决定。体质为10，智力和感知为3，魅力为1。速度为30尺；如果物体没有腿或其他可用于移动的附肢，则改为获得30尺飞行速度并可以悬停。如果物体牢固地附着在一个表面或更大的物体上（如固定在墙上的链条），其速度为0。它有30尺半径的盲视，超出该距离则失明。当活化物体降至0生命值时，它会恢复成原来的物体形态，任何剩余伤害会转移到其原始物体形态上。
如果你命令一个物体攻击，它可以对5尺范围内的一个生物进行一次近战攻击。它使用由其体型决定的攻击加值进行猛击攻击，造成钝击伤害。DM可能会根据物体的形状裁定特定的物体造成挥砍或穿刺伤害。
higher_level: 当你使用6环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你每比5环高1环，就可以额外活化两个物体。
desc_en: Objects come to life at your command. Choose up to ten nonmagical objects within range that are not being worn or carried. Medium targets count as two objects, Large targets count as four objects, Huge targets count as eight objects. You can't animate any object larger than Huge. Each target animates and becomes a creature under your control until the spell ends or until reduced to 0 hit points.

As a bonus action, you can mentally command any creature you made with this spell if the creature is within 500 feet of you (if you control multiple creatures, you can command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what action the creature will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the creature only defends itself against hostile creatures. Once given an order, the creature continues to follow it until its task is complete.
##### Animated Object Statistics
| Size | HP | AC | Attack | Str | Dex |
| Tiny | 20 | 18 | +8 to hit, 1d4 + 4 damage | 4 | 18 |
| Small | 25 | 16 | +6 to hit, 1d8 + 2 damage | 6 | 14 |
| Medium | 40 | 13 | +5 to hit, 2d6 + 1 damage | 10 | 12 |
| Large | 50 | 10 | +6 to hit, 2d10 + 2 damage | 14 | 10 |
| Huge | 80 | 10 | +8 to hit, 2d12 + 4 damage | 18 | 6 |

An animated object is a construct with AC, hit points, attacks, Strength, and Dexterity determined by its size. Its Constitution is 10 and its Intelligence and Wisdom are 3, and its Charisma is 1. Its speed is 30 feet; if the object lacks legs or other appendages it can use for locomotion, it instead has a flying speed of 30 feet and can hover. If the object is securely attached to a surface or a larger object, such as a chain bolted to a wall, its speed is 0. It has blindsight with a radius of 30 feet and is blind beyond that distance. When the animated object drops to 0 hit points, it reverts to its original object form, and any remaining damage carries over to its original object form.

If you command an object to attack, it can make a single melee attack against a creature within 5 feet of it. It makes a slam attack with an attack bonus and bludgeoning damage determined by its size. The GM might rule that a specific object inflicts slashing or piercing damage based on its form.
higher_level_en: If you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, you can animate two additional objects for each slot level above 5th.

name: 反生命护罩
desc: 一道闪烁的屏障从你向外延伸到10尺半径，并随你移动，保持以你为中心，阻挡除亡灵和构装生物外的其他生物。屏障持续法术持续时间。
屏障阻止受影响的生物通过或触及屏障内部。受影响的生物可以通过屏障施法或使用远程或触及武器进行攻击。
如果你移动导致受影响的生物被迫穿过屏障，法术结束。
desc_en: A shimmering barrier extends out from you in a 10-foot radius and moves with you, remaining centered on you and hedging out creatures other than undead and constructs. The barrier lasts for the duration.
The barrier prevents an affected creature from passing or reaching through. An affected creature can cast spells or make attacks with ranged or reach weapons through the barrier.
If you move so that an affected creature is forced to pass through the barrier, the spell ends.

name: 反魔法场
desc: 一个10尺半径的隐形反魔法球体围绕着你。这个区域与充满多元宇宙的魔法能量隔绝。在球体内，法术不能被施放，召唤生物消失，甚至魔法物品也会变成普通物品。直到法术结束，球体随你移动，以你为中心。
球体内的法术和其他魔法效应（除了神器或神祇创造的效应）被压制，无法延伸到球体外。消耗来施放被压制法术的法术位会被消耗。当效应被压制时，它不起作用，但压制的时间计入其持续时间。
目标效应。瞄准球体内生物或物体的法术和魔法效应（如魔法飞弹和魅惑人类）对该目标没有效果。
魔法区域。另一个法术或魔法效应的区域（如火球术）无法延伸到球体内。如果球体与魔法区域重叠，被球体覆盖的区域被压制。例如，火墙术创造的火焰在球体内被压制，如果重叠足够大，会在墙中形成一个缺口。
法术。对球体内生物或物体的任何活动法术或其他魔法效应在生物或物体处于其中时被压制。
魔法物品。魔法物品的属性和能力在球体内被压制。例如，球体内的+1长剑作为非魔法长剑起作用。
魔法武器用于攻击球体内目标或由球体内攻击者持握时，其属性和能力被压制。如果魔法武器或魔法弹药完全离开球体（例如，如果你向球体外目标发射魔法箭或投掷魔法矛），该物品的魔法在离开后立即不再被压制。
魔法旅行。传送和位面旅行在球体内不起作用，无论球体是此类魔法旅行的目的地还是出发点。通往其他地点、世界或存在位面的传送门，以及通往异位面空间（如绳技术创造的空间）的开口，在球体内暂时关闭。
生物和物体。由魔法召唤或创造的生物或物体在球体内暂时消失。一旦该生物占据的空间不再位于球体内，该生物立即重新出现。
解除魔法。解除魔法等法术和魔法效应对球体没有效果。同样，不同反魔法场法术创造的球体不会相互抵消。
material: 一撮铁粉或铁屑。
desc_en: A 10-foot-radius invisible sphere of antimagic surrounds you. This area is divorced from the magical energy that suffuses the multiverse. Within the sphere, spells can't be cast, summoned creatures disappear, and even magic items become mundane. Until the spell ends, the sphere moves with you, centered on you.

Spells and other magical effects, except those created by an artifact or a deity, are suppressed in the sphere and can't protrude into it. A slot expended to cast a suppressed spell is consumed. While an effect is suppressed, it doesn't function, but the time it spends suppressed counts against its duration.
***Targeted Effects.*** Spells and other magical effects, such as magic missile and charm person, that target a creature or an object in the sphere have no effect on that target.

***Areas of Magic.*** The area of another spell or magical effect, such as fireball, can't extend into the sphere. If the sphere overlaps an area of magic, the part of the area that is covered by the sphere is suppressed. For example, the flames created by a wall of fire are suppressed within the sphere, creating a gap in the wall if the overlap is large enough.
***Spells.*** Any active spell or other magical effect on a creature or an object in the sphere is suppressed while the creature or object is in it.
***Magic Items.*** The properties and powers of magic items are suppressed in the sphere. For example, a +1 longsword in the sphere functions as a nonmagical longsword.

A magic weapon's properties and powers are suppressed if it is used against a target in the sphere or wielded by an attacker in the sphere. If a magic weapon or a piece of magic ammunition fully leaves the sphere (for example, if you fire a magic arrow or throw a magic spear at a target outside the sphere), the magic of the item ceases to be suppressed as soon as it exits.

***Magical Travel.*** Teleportation and planar travel fail to work in the sphere, whether the sphere is the destination or the departure point for such magical travel. A portal to another location, world, or plane of existence, as well as an opening to an extradimensional space such as that created by the rope trick spell, temporarily closes while in the sphere.

***Creatures and Objects.*** A creature or object summoned or created by magic temporarily winks out of existence in the sphere. Such a creature instantly reappears once the space the creature occupied is no longer within the sphere.
***Dispel Magic.*** Spells and magical effects such as dispel magic have no effect on the sphere. Likewise, the spheres created by different antimagic field spells don't nullify each other.
material_en: A pinch of powdered iron or iron filings.

name: 嫌恶/同情术
desc: 该法术吸引或排斥你选择的生物。你瞄准射程内的一个目标，可以是一个巨型或更小的物体或生物，或一个不超过200尺立方的区域。然后指定一种智能生物类型，例如红龙、地精或吸血鬼。你在目标上施加一个光环，在持续时间内吸引或排斥指定生物。选择嫌恶或同情作为光环的效果。
嫌恶。魅惑使指定类型的生物产生强烈的离开该区域并避开目标的冲动。当这种生物能看到目标或进入其60尺内时，该生物必须成功通过感知豁免，否则会恐慌。该生物在能看到目标或在其60尺内时保持恐慌。被目标恐慌的生物必须使用其移动力移动到最近的安全地点，在那里它看不到目标。如果该生物移动到目标60尺以外且看不到它，该生物不再恐慌，但如果它重新看到目标或移动到其60尺内，它会再次恐慌。
同情。魅惑使指定类型的生物在60尺内或能看到目标时产生强烈的接近目标的冲动。当这种生物能看到目标或进入其60尺内时，该生物必须成功通过感知豁免，否则必须使用其每个回合的移动力进入该区域或移动到目标的触及范围内。当生物这样做后，它不能自愿离开目标。
如果目标伤害或以其他方式伤害受影响的生物，受影响的生物可以进行感知豁免来结束该效果，如下所述。
结束效果。如果受影响的生物在其回合结束时不在目标60尺内或无法看到它，该生物进行感知豁免。成功豁免后，该生物不再受目标影响，并认识到厌恶或吸引的感觉是魔法的。此外，受该法术影响的生物在法术持续期间每24小时被允许进行另一次感知豁免。
成功豁免该效果的生物对其免疫1分钟，之后它可以再次受到影响。
material: 嫌恶效果用浸泡在醋中的明矾块，或同情效果用一滴蜂蜜。
desc_en: This spell attracts or repels creatures of your choice. You target something within range, either a Huge or smaller object or creature or an area that is no larger than a 200-foot cube. Then specify a kind of intelligent creature, such as red dragons, goblins, or vampires. You invest the target with an aura that either attracts or repels the specified creatures for the duration. Choose antipathy or sympathy as the aura's effect.

***Antipathy.*** The enchantment causes creatures of the kind you designated to feel an intense urge to leave the area and avoid the target. When such a creature can see the target or comes within 60 feet of it, the creature must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or become frightened. The creature remains frightened while it can see the target or is within 60 feet of it. While frightened by the target, the creature must use its movement to move to the nearest safe spot from which it can't see the target. If the creature moves more than 60 feet from the target and can't see it, the creature is no longer frightened, but the creature becomes frightened again if it regains sight of the target or moves within 60 feet of it.

***Sympathy.*** The enchantment causes the specified creatures to feel an intense urge to approach the target while within 60 feet of it or able to see it. When such a creature can see the target or comes within 60 feet of it, the creature must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or use its movement on each of its turns to enter the area or move within reach of the target. When the creature has done so, it can't willingly move away from the target.
If the target damages or otherwise harms an affected creature, the affected creature can make a wisdom saving throw to end the effect, as described below.

***Ending the Effect.*** If an affected creature ends its turn while not within 60 feet of the target or able to see it, the creature makes a wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the creature is no longer affected by the target and recognizes the feeling of repugnance or attraction as magical. In addition, a creature affected by the spell is allowed another wisdom saving throw every 24 hours while the spell persists.
A creature that successfully saves against this effect is immune to it for 1 minute, after which time it can be affected again.
material_en: Either a lump of alum soaked in vinegar for the antipathy effect or a drop of honey for the sympathy effect.

name: 秘法眼
desc: 你在射程内创造出一个隐形的魔法眼睛，它在空中盘旋，持续法术持续时间。
你通过眼睛接收视觉信息，它有普通视觉和30尺黑暗视觉。眼睛可以朝任何方向看。
作为动作，你可以将眼睛在任何方向上移动最多30尺。眼睛可以移动的距离没有限制，但它不能进入其他位面。固体障碍会阻挡眼睛的移动，但眼睛可以通过小至1寸直径的开口。
material: 一点蝙蝠皮毛。
desc_en: You create an invisible, magical eye within range that hovers in the air for the duration.
You mentally receive visual information from the eye, which has normal vision and darkvision out to 30 feet. The eye can look in every direction.

As an action, you can move the eye up to 30 feet in any direction. There is no limit to how far away from you the eye can move, but it can't enter another plane of existence. A solid barrier blocks the eye's movement, but the eye can pass through an opening as small as 1 inch in diameter.
material_en: A bit of bat fur.

name: 奥术之手
desc: 你在射程内你能看到的未占据空间中创造出一个大型闪烁的半透明力场手。该手持续法术持续时间，并根据你的命令移动，模仿你自己手的动作。
该手是一个物体，AC为20，生命值等于你的生命值上限。如果降至0生命值，法术结束。它力量为26（+8），敏捷为10（+0）。该手不占据其空间。
当你施放该法术并在你的后续回合使用附赠动作时，你可以将手移动最多60尺，然后使其产生以下效果之一。
紧握之拳。该手对5尺范围内的一个生物或物体进行攻击。使用该手的游戏数据进行近战法术攻击。命中时，目标受到4d8力场伤害。
力能之手。该手试图将5尺范围内的一个生物向你选择的方向推动。使用手的力量进行检定，对抗目标的力量（运动）检定。如果目标是中型或更小，你在检定上具有优势。如果你成功，手将目标推动最多5尺加上等于你施法能力调整值五倍的距离。手随目标移动，保持在其5尺范围内。
擒拿之手。该手试图擒拿5尺范围内的一个巨型或更小生物。你使用手的力量值来解决擒拿。如果目标是中型或更小，你在检定上具有优势。当手擒拿目标时，你可以使用附赠动作使手挤压它。当你这样做时，目标受到2d6+你施法能力调整值的钝击伤害。
阻隔之手。该手在你和你选择的一个生物之间阻挡，直到你给予该手不同的命令。手移动到你和目标之间，为你提供对目标的半身掩蔽。如果目标的力量值小于或等于手的力量值，则目标无法穿过手的空间。如果目标的力量值高于手的力量值，目标可以向你移动穿过手的空间，但该空间对目标来说是困难地形。
higher_level: 当你使用6环或更高法术位施放该法术时，紧握之拳选项的伤害每比5环高1环就增加2d8，擒拿之手的伤害每比5环高1环就增加2d6。
material: 一个鸡蛋壳和一只蛇皮手套。
desc_en: You create a Large hand of shimmering, translucent force in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The hand lasts for the spell's duration, and it moves at your command, mimicking the movements of your own hand.

The hand is an object that has AC 20 and hit points equal to your hit point maximum. If it drops to 0 hit points, the spell ends. It has a Strength of 26 (+8) and a Dexterity of 10 (+0). The hand doesn't fill its space.
When you cast the spell and as a bonus action on your subsequent turns, you can move the hand up to 60 feet and then cause one of the following effects with it.
***Clenched Fist.*** The hand strikes one creature or object within 5 feet of it. Make a melee spell attack for the hand using your game statistics. On a hit, the target takes 4d8 force damage.

***Forceful Hand.*** The hand attempts to push a creature within 5 feet of it in a direction you choose. Make a check with the hand's Strength contested by the Strength (Athletics) check of the target. If the target is Medium or smaller, you have advantage on the check. If you succeed, the hand pushes the target up to 5 feet plus a number of feet equal to five times your spellcasting ability modifier. The hand moves with the target to remain within 5 feet of it.

***Grasping Hand.*** The hand attempts to grapple a Huge or smaller creature within 5 feet of it. You use the hand's Strength score to resolve the grapple. If the target is Medium or smaller, you have advantage on the check. While the hand is grappling the target, you can use a bonus action to have the hand crush it. When you do so, the target takes bludgeoning damage equal to 2d6 + your spellcasting ability modifier.

***Interposing Hand.*** The hand interposes itself between you and a creature you choose until you give the hand a different command. The hand moves to stay between you and the target, providing you with half cover against the target. The target can't move through the hand's space if its Strength score is less than or equal to the hand's Strength score. If its Strength score is higher than the hand's Strength score, the target can move toward you through the hand's space, but that space is difficult terrain for the target.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the damage from the clenched fist option increases by 2d8 and the damage from the grasping hand increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 5th.
material_en: An eggshell and a snakeskin glove.

name: 秘法锁
desc: 你触碰一扇关闭的门、窗、大门、箱子或其他入口，它在持续时间内被锁住。你和你施放该法术时指定的生物可以正常打开该物体。你还可以设置一个口令，当在物体5尺内说出时，可以压制该法术1分钟。否则，除非被破坏或法术被解除或压制，否则该物体无法通过。对物体施展敲击术可以压制秘法锁10分钟。
受到该法术影响时，该物体更难被破坏或强行打开；破坏它或撬开其上任何锁的DC增加10。
material: 价值至少25gp的金粉，该法术会将其消耗。
desc_en: You touch a closed door, window, gate, chest, or other entryway, and it becomes locked for the duration. You and the creatures you designate when you cast this spell can open the object normally. You can also set a password that, when spoken within 5 feet of the object, suppresses this spell for 1 minute. Otherwise, it is impassable until it is broken or the spell is dispelled or suppressed. Casting knock on the object suppresses arcane lock for 10 minutes.
While affected by this spell, the object is more difficult to break or force open; the DC to break it or pick any locks on it increases by 10.
material_en: Gold dust worth at least 25gp, which the spell consumes.

name: 奥术剑
desc: 你创造出一把力场形成的剑，悬浮在射程内。它持续法术持续时间。
当剑出现时，你对剑5尺范围内你选择的目标进行一次近战法术攻击。命中时，目标受到3d10力场伤害。直到法术结束前，你可以在你的每个回合使用附赠动作将剑移动最多20尺到你能够看见的位置，并对同一目标或不同目标重复这次攻击。
material: 一把微型白金剑，配有铜和锌制成的握把和剑柄，价值250gp。
desc_en: You create a sword-shaped plane of force that hovers within range. It lasts for the duration.

When the sword appears, you make a melee spell attack against a target of your choice within 5 feet of the sword. On a hit, the target takes 3d10 force damage. Until the spell ends, you can use a bonus action on each of your turns to move the sword up to 20 feet to a spot you can see and repeat this attack against the same target or a different one.
material_en: A miniature platinum sword with a grip and pommel of copper and zinc, worth 250 gp.

name: 奥术师的魔法灵光
desc: 你在触碰的一个生物或物体上施加幻术，使预言法术揭示关于它的虚假信息。目标可以是一个自愿的生物，或一个没有被其他生物携带或穿戴的物体。
当你施放该法术时，选择以下一种或两种效果。效果持续时间为法术持续时间。如果你连续30天每天对同一个生物或物体施放该法术，每次都施加相同的效果，该幻术会一直持续直到被解除。
***虚假灵光。***你改变目标在侦测魔法等侦测魔法灵光的法术和魔法效应中的外观。你可以让非魔法物体看起来有魔法，让魔法物体看起来没有魔法，或者改变物体的魔法灵光，使其看起来属于你选择的特定学派。当你在物体上使用此效果时，你可以让任何处理该物品的生物都看到该虚假魔法。
***伪装。***你改变目标在侦测生物类型的法术和魔法效应中的外观，例如圣武士的神圣感知或徽记术的触发条件。你选择一个生物类型，其他法术和魔法效应将目标视为该类型的生物或该阵营。
material: 一小块丝绸。
desc_en: You place an illusion on a creature or an object you touch so that divination spells reveal false information about it. The target can be a willing creature or an object that isn't being carried or worn by another creature.

When you cast the spell, choose one or both of the following effects. The effect lasts for the duration. If you cast this spell on the same creature or object every day for 30 days, placing the same effect on it each time, the illusion lasts until it is dispelled.

***False Aura.*** You change the way the target appears to spells and magical effects, such as detect magic, that detect magical auras. You can make a nonmagical object appear magical, a magical object appear nonmagical, or change the object's magical aura so that it appears to belong to a specific school of magic that you choose. When you use this effect on an object, you can make the false magic apparent to any creature that handles the item.

***Mask.*** You change the way the target appears to spells and magical effects that detect creature types, such as a paladin's Divine Sense or the trigger of a symbol spell. You choose a creature type and other spells and magical effects treat the target as if it were a creature of that type or of that alignment.
material_en: A small square of silk.

name: 星界投影
desc: 你和最多八个自愿生物将你们的星界身体投射到星界（如果你已经在该位面上，法术失败且施法被浪费）。你留下的物质身体处于无意识状态，处于暂停动画状态；它不需要食物或空气，也不会老化。
你的星界身体在几乎所有方面都像你的凡人形态，复制你的游戏数据和财产。主要区别是从你肩胛骨之间延伸并拖在你身后的一条银色绳索，在1尺后逐渐消失。这条绳索是你与你的物质身体的系绳。只要系绳保持完整，你就能找到回家的路。如果绳索被切断，只有当一个效应明确说明它会这样做时才会发生，你的灵魂和身体就会分离，立即杀死你。
当你离开星界并结束该法术时，你的身体及其所有装备会回到你离开的正常位面上。
material: 一个价值至少1000gp的、由至少一个与你一起旅行的生物提供的宝石，以及每被投影生物一个银条。
desc_en: You and up to eight willing creatures within range project your astral bodies into the Astral Plane (the spell fails and the casting is wasted if you are already on that plane). The material body you leave behind is unconscious and in a state of suspended animation; it doesn't need food or air and doesn't age.

Your astral body resembles your mortal form in almost every way, replicating your game statistics and possessions. The principal difference is the addition of a silvery cord that extends from between your shoulder blades and trails behind you, fading to invisibility after 1 foot. This cord is your tether to your material body. As long as the tether remains intact, you can find your way home. If the cord is cut--something that can happen only when an effect specifically states that it does--your soul and body are separated, killing you instantly.

Your astral form can freely travel through the Astral Plane and can pass through portals there leading to any other plane. If you enter a new plane or return to the plane you were on when casting this spell, your body and possessions are transported along the silver cord, allowing you to re-enter your body as you enter the new plane. Your astral form is a separate incarnation. Any damage or other effects that apply to it have no effect on your physical body, nor do they persist when you return to it.
The spell ends for you and your companions when you use your action to dismiss it. When the spell ends, the affected creature returns to its physical body, and it awakens.

The spell might also end early for you or one of your companions. A successful dispel magic spell used against an astral or physical body ends the spell for that creature. If a creature's original body or its astral form drops to 0 hit points, the spell ends for that creature. If the spell ends and the silver cord is intact, the cord pulls the creature's astral form back to its body, ending its state of suspended animation.
If you are returned to your body prematurely, your companions remain in their astral forms and must find their own way back to their bodies, usually by dropping to 0 hit points.
material_en: For each creature you affect with this spell, you must provide one jacinth worth at least 1,000gp and one ornately carved bar of silver worth at least 100gp, all of which the spell consumes.

name: 卜筮术
desc: 通过投掷镶嵌宝石的棍棒、滚动龙骨、摆放华丽的卡牌或使用其他占卜工具，你从一个异界实体收到关于你计划在接下来的30分钟内采取的特定行动的结果的预兆。DM从以下可能的预兆中选择：
- 吉，表示好结果
- 凶，表示坏结果
- 吉凶参半，表示好结果和坏结果
- 平，表示不好不坏的结果
该法术不考虑可能改变结果的情况，例如施放额外法术或失去或获得同伴。
material: 价值至少25gp的镶饰杖、卡牌、或骨骸，或其他占卜工具。
desc_en: By casting gem-inlaid sticks, rolling dragon bones, laying out ornate cards, or employing some other divining tool, you receive an omen from an otherworldly entity about the results of a specific course of action that you plan to take within the next 30 minutes. The GM chooses from the following possible omens:
- Weal, for good results
- Woe, for bad results
- Weal and woe, for both good and bad results
- Nothing, for results that aren't especially good or bad
The spell doesn't take into account any possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the casting of additional spells or the loss or gain of a companion.

If you cast the spell two or more times before completing your next long rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get a random reading. The GM makes this roll in secret.
material_en: Specially marked sticks, bones, or similar tokens worth at least 25gp.

name: 启蒙术
desc: 你触碰一个巨型或更小的野兽或植物。目标获得类似人类的感知能力，能够说一种你选择的语言，并能理解你所知道的一种语言。如果目标是植物，它获得能够活动和攻击的根须。该生物在法术持续时间内对你友好。
启蒙的生物的智力和魅力各为10。
material: 一块玛瑙，价值至少1000gp，该法术会将其消耗。
desc_en: After spending the casting time tracing magical pathways within a precious gemstone, you touch a Huge or smaller beast or plant. The target must have either no Intelligence score or an Intelligence of 3 or less. The target gains an Intelligence of 10. The target also gains the ability to speak one language you know. If the target is a plant, it gains the ability to move its limbs, roots, vines, creepers, and so forth, and it gains senses similar to a human's. Your GM chooses statistics appropriate for the awakened plant, such as the statistics for the awakened shrub or the awakened tree.

The awakened beast or plant is charmed by you for 30 days or until you or your companions do anything harmful to it. When the charmed condition ends, the awakened creature chooses whether to remain friendly to you, based on how you treated it while it was charmed.
material_en: An agate worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes.

name: 祸患术
desc: 最多三个你选择的射程内的生物必须在各自的下一个回合结束前进行一次魅力豁免。豁免失败时，该生物在持续时间内进行的一次攻击检定或豁免检定必须掷一个d4，并从结果中减去该数值。
higher_level: 当你使用2环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你可以额外指定一个生物作为目标，每比1环高1环就多指定一个。
material: 一滴血。
desc_en: Up to three creatures of your choice that you can see within range must make charisma saving throws. Whenever a target that fails this saving throw makes an attack roll or a saving throw before the spell ends, the target must roll a d4 and subtract the number rolled from the attack roll or saving throw.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.
material_en: A drop of blood.

name: 放逐术
desc: 你尝试将一个生物送往另一个位面。目标必须成功通过一次魅力豁免，否则被放逐。
如果目标是你当前位面的原住民，它被放逐到一个无害的半位面。在法术持续时间内，目标处于失能状态。法术结束时，目标返回其原来占据的空间，或最近的可用空间。
如果目标不是你当前位面的原住民，它会被送回原位面，法术立即结束。
higher_level: 当你使用5环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你每比4环高1环，就可以额外指定一个生物作为目标。
material: 令目标反感的物品。
desc_en: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another plane of existence. The target must succeed on a charisma saving throw or be banished.

If the target is native to the plane of existence you're on, you banish the target to a harmless demiplane. While there, the target is incapacitated. The target remains there until the spell ends, at which point the target reappears in the space it left or in the nearest unoccupied space if that space is occupied.

If the target is native to a different plane of existence than the one you're on, the target is banished with a faint popping noise, returning to its home plane. If the spell ends before 1 minute has passed, the target reappears in the space it left or in the nearest unoccupied space if that space is occupied. Otherwise, the target doesn't return.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 4th.
material_en: An item distasteful to the target.

name: 树皮术
desc: 你触碰的一个自愿生物的皮肤变得粗糙，像树皮一样坚硬。在持续时间内，该生物的AC至少为16，无论其穿着什么护甲。
material: 一把橡树皮。
desc_en: You touch a willing creature. Until the spell ends, the target's skin has a rough, bark-like appearance, and the target's AC can't be less than 16, regardless of what kind of armor it is wearing.
material_en: A handful of oak bark.

name: 希望信标
desc: 该法术赋予希望与活力。选择射程内你能看到的任意数量的生物。在持续时间内，每个目标在进行感知豁免和死亡豁免时具有优势，并恢复最大数量的生命值。
desc_en: This spell bestows hope and vitality. Choose any number of creatures within range. For the duration, each target has advantage on wisdom saving throws and death saving throws, and regains the maximum number of hit points possible from any healing.

name: 降咒
desc: 你触碰一个生物，该生物必须成功通过一次感知豁免，否则在法术持续时间内被诅咒。如果你选择，你可以选择诅咒的性质：
- 选择一项属性。该属性进行属性检定时具有劣势。
- 该生物对你进行的攻击检定具有劣势。
- 该生物必须在其每个回合开始时进行一次感知豁免，失败则浪费其动作。
- 你的攻击和法术对该生物造成额外1d8黯蚀伤害。
移除诅咒法术可以提前结束此效果。DM可能允许你以其他方式结束诅咒。
higher_level: 如果你使用4环或更高法术位施放该法术，法术的持续时间变为：4环为最长10分钟，5环为最长8小时，7环为最长24小时，9环为直至被解除。

dc.desc: On fail, become cursed for the duration of the spell.

desc_en: You touch a creature, and that creature must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or become cursed for the duration of the spell. When you cast this spell, choose the nature of the curse from the following options:
- Choose one ability score. While cursed, the target has disadvantage on ability checks and saving throws made with that ability score.
- While cursed, the target has disadvantage on attack rolls against you.
- While cursed, the target must make a wisdom saving throw at the start of each of its turns. If it fails, it wastes its action that turn doing nothing.
- While the target is cursed, your attacks and spells deal an extra 1d8 necrotic damage to the target.

A remove curse spell ends this effect. At the GM's option, you may choose an alternative curse effect, but it should be no more powerful than those described above. The GM has final say on such a curse's effect.
higher_level_en: If you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the duration is concentration, up to 10 minutes. If you use a spell slot of 5th level or higher, the duration is 8 hours. If you use a spell slot of 7th level or higher, the duration is 24 hours. If you use a 9th level spell slot, the spell lasts until it is dispelled. Using a spell slot of 5th level or higher grants a duration that doesn't require concentration.
material: 目标至少掉落的一撮头发。

name: 艾伐黑触手
desc: 你创造出一个20尺半径、20尺高的黑暗触手区域。该区域成为困难地形。每个位于该区域内的生物在其回合开始时必须成功通过一次敏捷豁免，否则受到3d6钝击伤害并被束缚，直到法术结束。被束缚的生物可以使用动作进行一次力量（运动）或敏捷（杂技）检定对抗你的法术豁免DC以逃脱。
material: 一条巨型章鱼或巨型乌贼的触手。

dc.desc: A creature restrained by the tentacles can use its action to make a Strength or Dexterity check (its choice) against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself.

desc_en: Squirming, ebony tentacles fill a 20-foot square on ground that you can see within range. For the duration, these tentacles turn the ground in the area into difficult terrain.

When a creature enters the affected area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the creature must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 3d6 bludgeoning damage and be restrained by the tentacles until the spell ends. A creature that starts its turn in the area and is already restrained by the tentacles takes 3d6 bludgeoning damage.
A creature restrained by the tentacles can use its action to make a Strength or Dexterity check (its choice) against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself.
material_en: A piece of tentacle from a giant octopus or a giant squid

name: 剑刃障壁
desc: 你在射程内你能看到的地面上的点创造出由旋转的魔法剑刃组成的垂直墙。墙长可达100尺，高20尺，厚5尺，或者是一个直径60尺、高20尺、厚5尺的环形墙。墙在持续时间内存在。
墙占据的空间是困难地形。墙后的每个生物必须进行敏捷豁免。豁免失败者受到6d10挥砍伤害，豁免成功者伤害减半。
一个生物在其回合内第一次进入墙内或在其回合内结束于墙内时，必须进行敏捷豁免。豁免失败者受到4d10挥砍伤害，豁免成功者伤害减半。
desc_en: You create a vertical wall of whirling, razor-sharp blades made of magical energy. The wall appears within range and lasts for the duration. You can make a straight wall up to 100 feet long, 20 feet high, and 5 feet thick, or a ringed wall up to 60 feet in diameter, 20 feet high, and 5 feet thick. The wall provides three-quarters cover to creatures behind it, and its space is difficult terrain.

When a creature enters the wall's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the creature must make a dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 6d10 slashing damage. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage.

name: 祝福术
desc: 你祝福最多三个你选择的射程内的生物。每当目标在法术结束前进行攻击检定或豁免检定时，它可以掷一个d4并将其加到结果上。
higher_level: 当你使用2环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你可以额外指定一个生物作为目标，每比1环高1环就多指定一个。
material: 一滴圣水。
desc_en: You bless up to three creatures of your choice within range. Whenever a target makes an attack roll or a saving throw before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to the attack roll or saving throw.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st.
material_en: A sprinkling of holy water.

name: 枯萎术
desc: 你对射程内的一个生物或魔法植物施加死灵能量。目标必须进行体质豁免，失败受到8d8黯蚀伤害，成功则伤害减半。该法术对非魔法植物没有伤害上限。
如果目标为魔法植物、植物生物或树精，它在豁免上具有劣势，并受到最大伤害。
higher_level: 当你使用5环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害每比4环高1环就增加1d8。
desc_en: Necromantic energy washes over a creature of your choice that you can see within range, draining moisture and vitality from it. The target must make a constitution saving throw. The target takes 8d8 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
If you target a plant creature or a magical plant, it makes the saving throw with disadvantage, and the spell deals maximum damage to it.
If you target a nonmagical plant that isn't a creature, such as a tree or shrub, it doesn't make a saving throw; it simply withers and dies.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level of higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 4th.

name: 目盲/耳聋术
desc: 你可以使一个生物失明或失聪。选择一个你能看见的射程内的生物，它必须进行一次体质豁免。失败时，目标在持续时间内失明或失聪（由你选择）。在每次其回合结束时，目标可以再进行一次体质豁免。成功时，法术结束。
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd.
desc_en: You can blind or deafen a foe. Choose one creature that you can see within range to make a constitution saving throw. If it fails, the target is either blinded or deafened (your choice) for the duration. At the end of each of its turns, the target can make a constitution saving throw. On a success, the spell ends.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd.

name: 闪现术
desc: 在法术持续时间内，你每回合结束时掷一次d20。如果掷出11或更高，你消失在你当前位面，出现在以太位面（如果已经在以太位面，则返回你当前位面）。在你下一回合开始时，当你没有动作或附赠动作时，你回到你选择的距离你消失位置10尺内的未占据空间。如果范围内没有可用空间，你出现在最近的可用空间中（由DM决定哪里最近）。你可以在该空间中正常地解散此效果。
当你在以太位面时，你可以看见并听见你离开的位面，该位面以灰度呈现，你只能看到60尺内的景象和声音，其他一切都是黑暗。只有其他以太位面生物可以影响你，反之亦然。不在以太位面的生物无法感知你或与你互动，除非你拥有影响其他以太位面生物的能力。
desc_en: Roll a d20 at the end of each of your turns for the duration of the spell. On a roll of 11 or higher, you vanish from your current plane of existence and appear in the Ethereal Plane (the spell fails and the casting is wasted if you were already on that plane). At the start of your next turn, and when the spell ends if you are on the Ethereal Plane, you return to an unoccupied space of your choice that you can see within 10 feet of the space you vanished from. If no unoccupied space is available within that range, you appear in the nearest unoccupied space (chosen at random if more than one space is equally near). You can dismiss this spell as an action.

While on the Ethereal Plane, you can see and hear the plane you originated from, which is cast in shades of gray, and you can't see anything there more than 60 feet away. You can only affect and be affected by other creatures on the Ethereal Plane. Creatures that aren't there can't perceive you or interact with you, unless they have the ability to do so.

name: 模糊术
desc: 你的身体变得模糊，在攻击者眼中不断移动和扭曲。在持续时间内，任何生物对你进行的攻击检定都具有劣势。攻击者不受此影响，如果它能看见你，且具有不依赖视线的盲视，或者能感知真相的魔法感知。
desc_en: Your body becomes blurred, shifting and wavering to all who can see you. For the duration, any creature has disadvantage on attack rolls against you. An attacker is immune to this effect if it doesn't rely on sight, as with blindsight, or can see through illusions, as with truesight.

name: 烙印斩
desc: 下一次你在法术结束前用武器击中一个生物时，你的武器闪烁着白热的光芒，该攻击对目标造成额外的2d6光耀伤害，并且目标在法术结束前散发出微光。在持续时间内，目标每回合开始时额外受到1d6光耀伤害。如果目标隐形，它在持续时间内变为可见，无法再次隐形，并且在法术结束前散发出微光。此外，如果是不死生物，它无法恢复生命值，直到法术结束。
higher_level: 当你使用3环或更高法术位施放该法术时，额外伤害（包括初始和后续）每比2环高1环就增加1d6。
desc_en: The next time you hit a creature with a weapon attack before this spell ends, the weapon gleams with astral radiance as you strike. The attack deals an extra 2d6 radiant damage to the target, which becomes visible if it's invisible, and the target sheds dim light in a 5-foot radius and can't become invisible until the spell ends.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the extra damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.

name: 燃烧之手
desc: 当你施放该法术时，你的拇指摩擦出的火花变成一道炙热的火焰，从你伸出的指尖喷出。每个在你15尺锥形范围内的生物必须进行一次敏捷豁免。豁免失败时，生物受到3d6火焰伤害，成功时受到一半伤害。
火焰点燃范围内任何未被穿戴或携带的可燃物品。
higher_level: 当你使用2环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害每比1环高1环就增加1d6。
desc_en: As you hold your hands with thumbs touching and fingers spread, a thin sheet of flames shoots forth from your outstretched fingertips. Each creature in a 15-foot cone must make a dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 3d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
The fire ignites any flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 1st.

name: 召雷术
desc: 你控制的大气在你上方120尺高度处产生一个风暴云，直到法术结束。该云持续存在，你可以在你的回合使用动作对你能在云下120尺内看到的点召唤一道闪电。每个距离该点5尺内的生物必须进行一次敏捷豁免，失败受到3d10闪电伤害，成功则伤害减半。
如果你处于户外暴风雨天气中施放此法术，你控制风暴而非创造新云，并获得对伤害检定的优势。
higher_level: 当你使用4环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你每比3环高1环，伤害就增加1d10。
desc_en: A storm cloud appears in the shape of a cylinder that is 10 feet tall with a 60-foot radius, centered on a point you can see 100 feet directly above you. The spell fails if you can't see a point in the air where the storm cloud could appear (for example, if you are in a room that can't accommodate the cloud).

When you cast the spell, choose a point you can see within range. A bolt of lightning flashes down from the cloud to that point. Each creature within 5 feet of that point must make a dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 3d10 lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. On each of your turns until the spell ends, you can use your action to call down lightning in this way again, targeting the same point or a different one.

If you are outdoors in stormy conditions when you cast this spell, the spell gives you control over the existing storm instead of creating a new one. Under such conditions, the spell's damage increases by 1d10.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th or higher level, the damage increases by 1d10 for each slot level above 3rd.

name: 平静情绪
desc: 你试图抑制一群人的强烈情绪。每个在你20尺半径球体范围内的类人生物必须进行一次魅力豁免；该生物可以自愿选择豁免失败，如果它愿意。豁免失败时，该生物在持续时间内受到以下效应之一的影响。
你可以选择压制任何导致目标被魅惑或恐慌的效果。当该法术对目标生效时，抑制该效果，但如果该法术在目标仍然被魅惑或恐慌的情况下结束，被压制的效应会恢复。
或者，你可以使目标对你在持续时间内变得漠不关心。这不是魅惑，该生物的态度对你变得友善。如果你或你的同伴伤害该生物，或对它使用有害法术，这种效果就会结束。
desc_en: You attempt to suppress strong emotions in a group of people. Each humanoid in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range must make a charisma saving throw; a creature can choose to fail this saving throw if it wishes. If a creature fails its saving throw, choose one of the following two effects. You can suppress any effect causing a target to be charmed or frightened. When this spell ends, any suppressed effect resumes, provided that its duration has not expired in the meantime.

Alternatively, you can make a target indifferent about creatures of your choice that it is hostile toward. This indifference ends if the target is attacked or harmed by a spell or if it witnesses any of its friends being harmed. When the spell ends, the creature becomes hostile again, unless the GM rules otherwise.

name: 连锁闪电
desc: 你创造出一道从你能看见的目标到你选择的其他目标的闪电弧。
闪电对目标造成10d8闪电伤害。目标可以进行敏捷豁免，成功则伤害减半。
然后你可以选择最多三个你能看见的且在距离第一个目标30尺内的其他目标。第一个目标可以是生物或物体，并且可以处于水下，但后续目标必须是生物而非物体，且不能处于水下。
每个后续目标受到的伤害比前一个目标少1d8。例如，第二个目标受到9d8闪电伤害，第三个目标受到8d8闪电伤害，以此类推。一个生物可以进行敏捷豁免，成功则伤害减半。
higher_level: 当你使用7环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害每比6环高1环就增加1d8。
material: A bit of fur; a piece of amber, glass, or a crystal rod; and three silver pins.
desc_en: You create a bolt of lightning that arcs toward a target of your choice that you can see within range. Three bolts then leap from that target to as many as three other targets, each of which must be within 30 feet of the first target. A target can be a creature or an object and can be targeted by only one of the bolts.
A target must make a dexterity saving throw. The target takes 10d8 lightning damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 7th level or higher, one additional bolt leaps from the first target to another target for each slot level above 6th.
material_en: A bit of fur; a piece of amber, glass, or a crystal rod; and three silver pins.

name: 魅惑人类
desc: 你试图魅惑施法时你射程内的一个人类。它必须进行一次感知豁免，如果你或你的同伴正在与它战斗，它在此豁免上具有优势。如果它豁免失败，它在法术持续时间内被你魅惑，或者直到你或你的同伴对它做有害的事情。被魅惑的生物视你为友善的熟人。当法术结束时，该生物知道它被魅惑了。
higher_level: 当你使用2环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你可以额外指定一个生物作为目标，每比1环高1环就多指定一个。这些生物彼此相距不得超过30尺。
desc_en: You attempt to charm a humanoid you can see within range. It must make a wisdom saving throw, and does so with advantage if you or your companions are fighting it. If it fails the saving throw, it is charmed by you until the spell ends or until you or your companions do anything harmful to it. The charmed creature regards you as a friendly acquaintance. When the spell ends, the creature knows it was charmed by you.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 1st. The creatures must be within 30 feet of each other when you target them.

name: 寒颤之触
desc: 你在射程内你能看见的一个生物周围创造出一个幽灵般的、骨瘦如柴的手的幻象。进行一次远程法术攻击以击中目标。命中时，目标受到1d8亡灵伤害，并且直到你的下个回合开始，它无法恢复生命值。此外，目标在持续时间内是不死生物时，在你的下个回合开始之前，它对你进行的攻击检定具有劣势。
该法术的伤害在你达到5级时增加1d8（变为2d8），11级时增加2d8（变为3d8），17级时增加3d8（变为4d8）。
desc_en: You create a ghostly, skeletal hand in the space of a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the creature to assail it with the chill of the grave. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 necrotic damage, and it can't regain hit points until the start of your next turn. Until then, the hand clings to the target.
If you hit an undead target, it also has disadvantage on attack rolls against you until the end of your next turn.
This spell's damage increases by 1d8 when you reach 5th level (2d8), 11th level (3d8), and 17th level (4d8).

name: 死亡法阵
desc: 负能量从射程内你选择的点涌出，形成一个60尺半径的球形区域，吞没该区域内所有生物。
每个在该区域内的生物必须进行体质豁免。豁免失败者受到8d6亡灵伤害，豁免成功者伤害减半。
higher_level: 当你使用7环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害每比6环高1环就增加2d6。
material: The powder of a crushed black pearl worth at least 500 gp.
desc_en: A sphere of negative energy ripples out in a 60-foot radius sphere from a point within range. Each creature in that area must make a constitution saving throw. A target takes 8d6 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 7th level or higher, the damage increases by 2d6 for each slot level above 6th.
material_en: The powder of a crushed black pearl worth at least 500 gp.

name: 鹰眼术
desc: 你在熟悉的位置（你曾访问过或看见过的地方）或明显突出的位置（例如一扇门后面、拐角处、树林中或走廊里）创造一个隐形的传感器，使你能看见或听见该位置及其周围（取决于你选择的功能）。该传感器在法术持续时间内保持原位，不能被攻击或以其他方式互动。
当你施放该法术时，选择看见或听见。你可以通过传感器使用所选感官。转换感官需要动作。
带有智力（调查）检定对抗你的法术豁免DC的感知生物可以看到一个拳头大小的、半透明的球体，这是你传感器的可见形态。
material: 价值至少100gp的专注物，例如一颗水晶、一面银镜或一个圣水font。
desc_en: You create an invisible sensor within range in a location familiar to you (a place you have visited or seen before) or in an obvious location that is unfamiliar to you (such as behind a door, around a corner, or in a grove of trees). The sensor remains in place for the duration, and it can't be attacked or otherwise interacted with.
When you cast the spell, you choose seeing or hearing. You can use the chosen sense through the sensor as if you were in its space. As your action, you can switch between seeing and hearing.
A creature that can see the sensor (such as a creature benefiting from see invisibility or truesight) sees a luminous, intangible orb about the size of your fist.
material_en: A focus worth at least 100gp, either a jeweled horn for hearing or a glass eye for seeing.

name: 克隆术
desc: 该法术在密封容器中培育一个生物的无意识复制体，并需要120天才能达到成熟状态。你也可以选择让克隆体保持更长时间的未成熟状态。克隆体在遗传上与原体相同，只是没有穿过的装备。克隆体在物理上与原体相同，拥有相同的疤痕、纹身和其他身体特征。
如果原体死亡，其灵魂立即转移到克隆体中，前提是该灵魂是自由的且愿意返回。该克隆体在物理上与原体相同，拥有相同的记忆、能力和等级。如果原体有多个克隆体，灵魂进入最近的一个。
容器必须保持未受干扰，并保持在10-60华氏度的恒定温度范围内。如果容器被移动或温度超出此范围，克隆体会死亡。
material: 价值至少1000gp的钻石和至少1立方寸的复制生物肉体样本，放入价值至少2000gp的容器中，容器装满了价值至少100gp的炼金试剂。该法术会消耗材料。
desc_en: This spell grows an inert duplicate of a living creature as a safeguard against death. This clone forms inside a sealed vessel and grows to full size and maturity after 120 days; you can also choose to have the clone be a younger version of the same creature. It remains inert and endures indefinitely, as long as its vessel remains undisturbed.

At any time after the clone matures, if the original creature dies, its soul transfers to the clone, provided that the soul is free and willing to return. The clone is physically identical to the original and has the same personality, memories, and abilities, but none of the original's equipment. The original creature's physical remains, if they still exist, become inert and can't thereafter be restored to life, since the creature's soul is elsewhere.
material_en: A diamond worth at least 1,000 gp and at least 1 cubic inch of flesh of the creature that is to be cloned, which the spell consumes, and a vessel worth at least 2,000 gp that has a sealable lid and is large enough to hold a Medium creature, such as a huge urn, coffin, mud-filled cyst in the ground, or crystal container filled with salt water.

name: 死云术
desc: 你在射程内创造出一个20尺半径的黄色恶心气体球体。该区域处于重度遮蔽状态。每个位于该区域内的生物在其回合开始时必须成功通过一次体质豁免，否则受到5d8毒素伤害，豁免成功则伤害减半。对该毒素免疫的生物或不需要呼吸的生物不受影响。
每回合，风可以将雾气移动最多10尺，远离你。
higher_level: 当你使用6环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害每比5环高1环就增加1d8。

dc.desc: Creatures are affected even if they hold their breath or don't need to breathe.

desc_en: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of poisonous, yellow-green fog centered on a point you choose within range. The fog spreads around corners. It lasts for the duration or until strong wind disperses the fog, ending the spell. Its area is heavily obscured.

When a creature enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, that creature must make a constitution saving throw. The creature takes 5d8 poison damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. Creatures are affected even if they hold their breath or don't need to breathe.

The fog moves 10 feet away from you at the start of each of your turns, rolling along the surface of the ground. The vapors, being heavier than air, sink to the lowest level of the land, even pouring down openings.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.

name: 七彩喷射
desc: 从你指向的手指喷射出一阵炫目的光芒。每个在你15尺锥形范围内的生物被眩晕，直到你的下个回合结束。掷6d10；结果是生命值总量。该区域的生命值总量等于或小于结果的生物受到影响，从生命值最低的生物开始计算。
当生物受到此法术影响时，其视力在持续时间内被遮挡，如果它依赖视力的话。
higher_level: 当你使用2环或更高法术位施放该法术时，每比1环高1环就额外掷2d10。
material: A pinch of powder or sand that is colored red, yellow, and blue.
desc_en: A dazzling array of flashing, colored light springs from your hand. Roll 6d10; the total is how many hit points of creatures this spell can effect. Creatures in a 15-foot cone originating from you are affected in ascending order of their current hit points (ignoring unconscious creatures and creatures that can't see).

Starting with the creature that has the lowest current hit points, each creature affected by this spell is blinded until the spell ends. Subtract each creature's hit points from the total before moving on to the creature with the next lowest hit points. A creature's hit points must be equal to or less than the remaining total for that creature to be affected.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, roll an additional 2d10 for each slot level above 1st.
material_en: A pinch of powder or sand that is colored red, yellow, and blue.

name: 命令术
desc: 你对施法时射程内你能看见的一个生物说出一个字的命令。目标必须成功通过一次感知豁免，否则在其下一回合跟随该命令。该法术对不死生物无效。
以下是一些典型的命令及其效果。你可以发出命令而非以下命令。如果你这样做，DM决定目标如何表现。如果目标无法完成你的命令，法术结束。
***过来。***目标以其速度向你移动的最短路径，尽可能安全地移动。
***放下。***目标放下其持有的物品，然后结束其回合。
***离开。***目标以其速度远离你，尽可能安全地移动。
***跪下。***目标趴下，然后结束其回合。
***跑。***目标以其速度远离你，尽可能安全地移动。
higher_level: 当你使用2环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你可以额外影响一个生物，每比1环高1环就多一个。这些生物彼此相距不得超过30尺。
desc_en: You speak a one-word command to a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or follow the command on its next turn. The spell has no effect if the target is undead, if it doesn't understand your language, or if your command is directly harmful to it.

Some typical commands and their effects follow. You might issue a command other than one described here. If you do so, the GM determines how the target behaves. If the target can't follow your command, the spell ends.
***Approach.*** The target moves toward you by the shortest and most direct route, ending its turn if it moves within 5 feet of you.
***Drop.*** The target drops whatever it is holding and then ends its turn.
***Flee.*** The target spends its turn moving away from you by the fastest available means.
***Grovel.*** The target falls prone and then ends its turn.

***Halt.*** The target doesn't move and takes no actions. A flying creature stays aloft, provided that it is able to do so. If it must move to stay aloft, it flies the minimum distance needed to remain in the air.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you can affect one additional creature for each slot level above 1st. The creatures must be within 30 feet of each other when you target them.

name: 通神术
desc: 你与你的守护神或守护神仆从联系，并提出最多三个可以用是或否回答的问题。你必须在法术持续结束前完成提问。你每次施放该法术时都会收到正确的回答。
material: 香和用于仪式的合适祭品。
desc_en: You contact your deity or a divine proxy and ask up to three questions that can be answered with a yes or no. You must ask your questions before the spell ends. You receive a correct answer for each question.

Divine beings aren't necessarily omniscient, so you might receive "unclear" as an answer if a question pertains to information that lies beyond the deity's knowledge. In a case where a one-word answer could be misleading or contrary to the deity's interests, the GM might offer a short phrase as an answer instead.

If you cast the spell two or more times before finishing your next long rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get no answer. The GM makes this roll in secret.
material_en: Incense and a vial of holy or unholy water.

name: 融身入林
desc: 你短暂地与自然建立联系，获得周围地区的信息。在户外时，该法术让你了解3英里内的土地、水体、植物、矿物、建筑、动物和危险生物。在洞穴或其他自然地下场所时，其范围为300尺。该法术不能揭示存在强大的不死生物或构装生物。
desc_en: You briefly become one with nature and gain knowledge of the surrounding territory. In the outdoors, the spell gives you knowledge of the land within 3 miles of you. In caves and other natural underground settings, the radius is limited to 300 feet. The spell doesn't function where nature has been replaced by construction, such as in dungeons and towns.
You instantly gain knowledge of up to three facts of your choice about any of the following subjects as they relate to the area:
- terrain and bodies of water
- prevalent plants, minerals, animals, or peoples
- powerful celestials, fey, fiends, elementals, or undead
- influence from other planes of existence
- buildings
For example, you could determine the location of powerful undead in the area, the location of major sources of safe drinking water, and the location of any nearby towns.

name: 理解语言
desc: 在持续时间内，你理解你听到的任何口语的字面意义。你也能理解你看到的任何书面文字，只要你触摸书写该文字的表面。完全理解一个文本需要大约1分钟的时间。
这并不能解密代码或揭示隐藏的信息，或帮助你理解秘密文字。它也不会让你说或书写你不懂的语言。
material: 一撮煤灰和盐。
desc_en: For the duration, you understand the literal meaning of any spoken language that you hear. You also understand any written language that you see, but you must be touching the surface on which the words are written. It takes about 1 minute to read one page of text.
This spell doesn't decode secret messages in a text or a glyph, such as an arcane sigil, that isn't part of a written language.
material_en: A pinch of soot and salt.

name: 强迫术
desc: 你迫使射程内你能看到的生物进行一些非自然的行为。目标必须成功通过一次感知豁免，否则在法术持续时间内被你魅惑。每个被魅惑的目标必须使用其移动尽可能水平移动，并且必须在其回合结束前使用其动作进行一次近战攻击。你可以指定攻击的方向或选择的目标。
desc_en: Creatures of your choice that you can see within range and that can hear you must make a wisdom saving throw. A target automatically succeeds on this saving throw if it can't be charmed. On a failed save, a target is affected by this spell. Until the spell ends, you can use a bonus action on each of your turns to designate a direction that is horizontal to you. Each affected target must use as much of its movement as possible to move in that direction on its next turn. It can take any action before it moves. After moving in this way, it can make another Wisdom save to try to end the effect.
A target isn't compelled to move into an obviously deadly hazard, such as a fire or a pit, but it will provoke opportunity attacks to move in the designated direction.
material: 由鸽心制成的圣徽。

name: 寒冰锥
desc: 一道60尺锥形的冰冷寒风从你手中喷出。每个位于该区域内的生物必须进行体质豁免，失败受到8d8冷冻伤害，成功则伤害减半。
被该法术杀死的生物会变成frozen雕像，直到解冻。
higher_level: 当你使用6环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害每比5环高1环就增加1d8。
material: 一个小水晶或玻璃锥。

dc.desc: A creature killed by this spell becomes a frozen statue until it thaws.

desc_en: A blast of cold air erupts from your hands. Each creature in a 60-foot cone must make a constitution saving throw. A creature takes 8d8 cold damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
A creature killed by this spell becomes a frozen statue until it thaws.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 5th.
material_en: A small crystal or glass cone.

name: 困惑术
desc: 该法术影响射程内你能看到的生物。每个目标必须成功通过一次感知豁免，否则在法术持续时间内被困惑。被困惑的生物无法采取反应，只能掷d10以决定其行为。
1：生物使用其所有移动力向一个随机方向移动。
2-6：生物本回合不移动也不采取动作。
7-8：生物使用动作对触及范围内的一个随机生物进行近战攻击。
9-10：生物可以正常行动和移动。
higher_level: 当你使用5环或更高法术位施放该法术时，影响半径增加5尺，每比4环高1环。
material: 三个坚果壳。
desc_en: This spell assaults and twists creatures' minds, spawning delusions and provoking uncontrolled action. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you choose within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw when you cast this spell or be affected by it.
An affected target can't take reactions and must roll a d10 at the start of each of its turns to determine its behavior for that turn.
| d10 | Behavior |
| 1 | The creature uses all its movement to move in a random direction. To determine the direction, roll a d8 and assign a direction to each die face. The creature doesn't take an action this turn. |
| 2-6 | The creature doesn't move or take actions this turn. |
| 7-8 | The creature uses its action to make a melee attack against a randomly determined creature within its reach. If there is no creature within its reach, the creature does nothing this turn. |
| 9-10 | The creature can act and move normally. |
At the end of each of its turns, an affected target can make a Wisdom saving throw. If it succeeds, this effect ends for that target.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, the radius of the sphere increases by 5 feet for each slot level above 4th.
material_en: Three walnut shells.

name: 召唤动物
desc: 你召唤野兽，它们出现在射程内你能看到的未占据空间中。选择以下选项之一以确定出现什么：
- 一个挑战等级2或更低的野兽
- 两个挑战等级1或更低的野兽
- 四个挑战等级1/2或更低的野兽
- 八个挑战等级1/4或更低的野兽
每个野兽同时被视为精类生物，并且在掉落至0生命值或法术结束时消失。
这些生物对你是友好的，对你的同伴也是友好的。掷先攻为这些生物，它们作为一个群体一起行动，听从你的口头命令（无需动作）。如果你没有发出命令，它们只会在被敌对生物攻击时自卫。
higher_level: When you cast this spell using certain higher-level spell slots, you choose one of the summoning options above, and more creatures appear: twice as many with a 5th-level slot, three times as many with a 7th-level.
desc_en: You summon fey spirits that take the form of beasts and appear in unoccupied spaces that you can see within range. Choose one of the following options for what appears:
- One beast of challenge rating 2 or lower
- Two beasts of challenge rating 1 or lower
- Four beasts of challenge rating 1/2 or lower
- Eight beasts of challenge rating 1/4 or lower
- Each beast is also considered fey, and it disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.

The summoned creatures are friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the summoned creatures as a group, which has its own turns. They obey any verbal commands that you issue to them (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to them, they defend themselves from hostile creatures, but otherwise take no actions.
The GM has the creatures' statistics.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using certain higher-level spell slots, you choose one of the summoning options above, and more creatures appear: twice as many with a 5th-level slot, three times as many with a 7th-level.

name: 召唤天界生物
desc: 你召唤一个挑战等级4或更低的天界生物。它出现在射程内你能看见的未占据空间中。该天界生物在生命值降至0或法术结束时消失。
该天界生物对你和你的同伴友好。你将它 roll 先攻，它获得自己的回合。它服从你发出的任何口头命令（不需要动作），只要不违反其阵营。如果你不发出命令，它只会在被敌对生物攻击时自卫。
higher_level: 当你使用9环法术位施放该法术时，你召唤一个挑战等级5的天界生物。
desc_en: You summon a celestial of challenge rating 4 or lower, which appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The celestial disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.

The celestial is friendly to you and your companions for the duration. Roll initiative for the celestial, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you), as long as they don't violate its alignment. If you don't issue any commands to the celestial, it defends itself from hostile creatures but otherwise takes no actions.
The GM has the celestial's statistics.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a 9th-level spell slot, you summon a celestial of challenge rating 5 or lower.

name: 召唤元素生物
desc: 你打开一道通往元素位面的传送门，在射程内你能看到的未占据空间中召唤出一个元素生物。选择气、土、火或水元素，或一个挑战等级5或更低的元素生物。该生物在法术结束、降至0生命值或你失去专注时消失。
该生物对你是友好的，对你的同伴也是友好的。
higher_level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the challenge rating increases by 1 for each slot level above 5th.
material: 价值至少10gp的燃烧香。
desc_en: You call forth an elemental servant. Choose an area of air, earth, fire, or water that fills a 10-foot cube within range. An elemental of challenge rating 5 or lower appropriate to the area you chose appears in an unoccupied space within 10 feet of it. For example, a fire elemental emerges from a bonfire, and an earth elemental rises up from the ground. The elemental disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.

The elemental is friendly to you and your companions for the duration. Roll initiative for the elemental, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to the elemental, it defends itself from hostile creatures but otherwise takes no actions.

If your concentration is broken, the elemental doesn't disappear. Instead, you lose control of the elemental, it becomes hostile toward you and your companions, and it might attack. An uncontrolled elemental can't be dismissed by you, and it disappears 1 hour after you summoned it.
The GM has the elemental's statistics.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the challenge rating increases by 1 for each slot level above 5th.
material_en: Burning incense for air, soft clay for earth, sulfur and phosphorus for fire, or water and sand for water.

name: 召唤精类
desc: 你召唤一个挑战等级6或更低的精类生物。它出现在射程内你能看见的未占据空间中。该精类生物在生命值降至0或法术结束时消失。
该精类生物对你和你的同伴友好。你将它 roll 先攻，它获得自己的回合。它服从你发出的任何口头命令（不需要动作），只要不违反其阵营。如果你不发出命令，它只会在被敌对生物攻击时自卫。
higher_level: 当你使用7环或更高法术位施放该法术时，挑战等级每比6环高1环就增加1。
desc_en: You summon a fey creature of challenge rating 6 or lower, or a fey spirit that takes the form of a beast of challenge rating 6 or lower. It appears in an unoccupied space that you can see within range. The fey creature disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.

The fey creature is friendly to you and your companions for the duration. Roll initiative for the creature, which has its own turns. It obeys any verbal commands that you issue to it (no action required by you), as long as they don't violate its alignment. If you don't issue any commands to the fey creature, it defends itself from hostile creatures but otherwise takes no actions.

If your concentration is broken, the fey creature doesn't disappear. Instead, you lose control of the fey creature, it becomes hostile toward you and your companions, and it might attack. An uncontrolled fey creature can't be dismissed by you, and it disappears 1 hour after you summoned it.
The GM has the fey creature's statistics.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 7th level or higher, the challenge rating increases by 1 for each slot level above 6th.

name: 召唤次级元素生物
desc: 你召唤出元素生物，它们出现在射程内你能看到的未占据空间中。选择以下选项之一以确定出现什么：
- 一个挑战等级2或更低的元素生物
- 两个挑战等级1或更低的元素生物
- 四个挑战等级1/2或更低的元素生物
- 八个挑战等级1/4或更低的元素生物
每个元素生物在掉落至0生命值或法术结束时消失。这些生物对你是友好的，对你的同伴也是友好的。
higher_level: When you cast this spell using certain higher-level spell slots, you choose one of the summoning options above, and more creatures appear: twice as many with a 6th-level slot and three times as many with an 8th-level slot.
desc_en: You summon elementals that appear in unoccupied spaces that you can see within range. You choose one the following options for what appears:
- One elemental of challenge rating 2 or lower
- Two elementals of challenge rating 1 or lower
- Four elementals of challenge rating 1/2 or lower
- Eight elementals of challenge rating 1/4 or lower.
An elemental summoned by this spell disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.

The summoned creatures are friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the summoned creatures as a group, which has its own turns. They obey any verbal commands that you issue to them (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to them, they defend themselves from hostile creatures, but otherwise take no actions.
The GM has the creatures' statistics.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using certain higher-level spell slots, you choose one of the summoning options above, and more creatures appear: twice as many with a 6th-level slot and three times as many with an 8th-level slot.

name: 召唤林地生物
desc: 你召唤出精类生物，它们出现在射程内你能看到的未占据空间中。选择以下选项之一以确定出现什么：
- 一个挑战等级2或更低的精类生物
- 两个挑战等级1或更低的精类生物
- 四个挑战等级1/2或更低的精类生物
- 八个挑战等级1/4或更低的精类生物
每个精类生物在掉落至0生命值或法术结束时消失。这些生物对你是友好的，对你的同伴也是友好的。
higher_level: When you cast this spell using certain higher-level spell slots, you choose one of the summoning options above, and more creatures appear: twice as many with a 6th-level slot and three times as many with an 8th-level slot.
material: 每个被召唤生物一颗冬青浆果。
desc_en: You summon fey creatures that appear in unoccupied spaces that you can see within range. Choose one of the following options for what appears:
- One fey creature of challenge rating 2 or lower
- Two fey creatures of challenge rating 1 or lower
- Four fey creatures of challenge rating 1/2 or lower
- Eight fey creatures of challenge rating 1/4 or lower
A summoned creature disappears when it drops to 0 hit points or when the spell ends.

The summoned creatures are friendly to you and your companions. Roll initiative for the summoned creatures as a group, which have their own turns. They obey any verbal commands that you issue to them (no action required by you). If you don't issue any commands to them, they defend themselves from hostile creatures, but otherwise take no actions.
The GM has the creatures' statistics.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using certain higher-level spell slots, you choose one of the summoning options above, and more creatures appear: twice as many with a 6th-level slot and three times as many with an 8th-level slot.
material_en: One holly berry per creature summoned.

name: 异界探知
desc: 你短暂地与另一位面的存在（如外域神、大恶魔或伟大先祖）建立精神联系。你可以向该存在提出最多五个问题。它每个问题都会回答，但可能以谜语形式。如果该存在不属于你所在位面，接触可能会损害你的精神。

dc.desc: On a failure, you take 6d6 psychic damage and are insane until you finish a long rest.

desc_en: You mentally contact a demigod, the spirit of a long-dead sage, or some other mysterious entity from another plane. Contacting this extraplanar intelligence can strain or even break your mind. When you cast this spell, make a DC 15 intelligence saving throw. On a failure, you take 6d6 psychic damage and are insane until you finish a long rest. While insane, you can't take actions, can't understand what other creatures say, can't read, and speak only in gibberish. A greater restoration spell cast on you ends this effect.

On a successful save, you can ask the entity up to five questions. You must ask your questions before the spell ends. The GM answers each question with one word, such as "yes," "no," "maybe," "never," "irrelevant," or "unclear" (if the entity doesn't know the answer to the question). If a one-word answer would be misleading, the GM might instead offer a short phrase as an answer.

name: 疫病术
desc: 你的触碰使目标感染疾病。目标必须进行体质豁免，失败则受到以下效果之一（由你选择）：
- 失明：目标的眼睛流脓，陷入目盲。
- 腐烂：目标肉体腐烂，进行魅力检定时具有劣势。
- 疯狂：目标无法清晰思考，进行感知检定时具有劣势。
- 恐惧：目标陷入恐惧和偏执，进行感知豁免时具有劣势。
- 语言：目标无法清晰说话，进行魅力检定时具有劣势。
- 血热：目标体内出血，进行体质检定时具有劣势。

dc.desc: After succeeding on three of these saving throws, the creature recovers from the disease, and the spell ends.

desc_en: Your touch inflicts disease. Make a melee spell attack against a creature within your reach. On a hit, you afflict the creature with a disease of your choice from any of the ones described below.

At the end of each of the target's turns, it must make a constitution saving throw. After failing three of these saving throws, the disease's effects last for the duration, and the creature stops making these saves. After succeeding on three of these saving throws, the creature recovers from the disease, and the spell ends.
Since this spell induces a natural disease in its target, any effect that removes a disease or otherwise ameliorates a disease's effects apply to it.
***Blinding Sickness.*** Pain grips the creature's mind, and its eyes turn milky white. The creature has disadvantage on wisdom checks and wisdom saving throws and is blinded.
***Filth Fever.*** A raging fever sweeps through the creature's body. The creature has disadvantage on strength checks, strength saving throws, and attack rolls that use Strength.
***Flesh Rot.*** The creature's flesh decays. The creature has disadvantage on Charisma checks and vulnerability to all damage.

***Mindfire.*** The creature's mind becomes feverish. The creature has disadvantage on intelligence checks and intelligence saving throws, and the creature behaves as if under the effects of the confusion spell during combat.
***Seizure.*** The creature is overcome with shaking. The creature has disadvantage on dexterity checks, dexterity saving throws, and attack rolls that use Dexterity.

***Slimy Doom.*** The creature begins to bleed uncontrollably. The creature has disadvantage on constitution checks and constitution saving throws. In addition, whenever the creature takes damage, it is stunned until the end of its next turn.

name: 意外术
desc: 选择一个你可以施放的5环或更低环阶的法术，且该法术的施法时间为1动作，并将其作为本法术的一部分施放。你必须为该法术消耗一个法术位，如同正常施放一样。该法术不会立即生效，而是在特定情况下才会触发。
你描述在何种情况下该法术会触发。然后描述该情况，该情况可以发生在最多10天的任何时间。该情况必须基于你所处的环境，在你能看到、听到或感知到的范围内发生的事情，而非基于其他动作。例如，情况可以是我掉到水下或有活物进入30尺范围内。一旦你施放意外术，该法术将一直待命，直到触发或10天期限结束。
当特定情况发生时，该法术立即生效，如同你在该时刻施放一样，以意外术的目标为目标。如果该法术以其他生物为目标，你必须选择一个你在施放意外术时能够看到的生物。如果该法术影响的区域，该区域会以意外术的目标为中心。如果该法术需要集中，它会在达到其完整持续时间后结束。
意外术在触发后或10天后结束。
material: 一尊 Jade 雕刻的你自己的雕像和价值至少1500gp的象牙牌匾。雕像必须被放在牌匾上，且牌匾上必须用包含触发条件的文字描述。
desc_en: Choose a spell of 5th level or lower that you can cast, that has a casting time of 1 action, and that can target you. You cast that spell--called the contingent spell--as part of casting contingency, expending spell slots for both, but the contingent spell doesn't come into effect. Instead, it takes effect when a certain circumstance occurs. You describe that circumstance when you cast the two spells. For example, a contingency cast with water breathing might stipulate that water breathing comes into effect when you are engulfed in water or a similar liquid.
The contingent spell takes effect immediately after the circumstance is met for the first time, whether or not you want it to. and then contingency ends.

The contingent spell takes effect only on you, even if it can normally target others. You can use only one contingency spell at a time. If you cast this spell again, the effect of another contingency spell on you ends. Also, contingency ends on you if its material component is ever not on your person.
material_en: A statuette of yourself carved from ivory and decorated with gems worth at least 1,500 gp.

name: 不灭明焰
desc: 你在你触碰的一个物体上制造出一束火焰，其效果与火焰相似，但不会发出热量，也不消耗氧气。该火焰可以覆盖或隐藏，但不会熄灭，在持续时间内一直发光。
material: 价值至少50gp的红宝石粉尘，该法术会将其消耗。
desc_en: A flame, equivalent in brightness to a torch, springs forth from an object that you touch. The effect looks like a regular flame, but it creates no heat and doesn't use oxygen. A continual flame can be covered or hidden but not smothered or quenched.
material_en: Ruby dust worth 50 gp, which the spell consumes.

name: 操控水体
desc: 你控制一个100尺立方区域内的水体。你可以从以下效果中选择一种，并在法术持续时间内重复使用该效果：
洪水。你使区域内水位上升最多20尺。
分水。你使区域内水位下降最多20尺。
定向。你改变水流方向。
漩涡。你在区域内创造一个漩涡。
material: 一滴水和一撮尘土。
desc_en: Until the spell ends, you control any freestanding water inside an area you choose that is a cube up to 100 feet on a side. You can choose from any of the following effects when you cast this spell. As an action on your turn, you can repeat the same effect or choose a different one.
***Flood.*** You cause the water level of all standing water in the area to rise by as much as 20 feet. If the area includes a shore, the flooding water spills over onto dry land.

If you choose an area in a large body of water, you instead create a 20-foot tall wave that travels from one side of the area to the other and then crashes down. Any Huge or smaller vehicles in the wave's path are carried with it to the other side. Any Huge or smaller vehicles struck by the wave have a 25 percent chance of capsizing.
The water level remains elevated until the spell ends or you choose a different effect. If this effect produced a wave, the wave repeats on the start of your next turn while the flood effect lasts.

***Part Water.*** You cause water in the area to move apart and create a trench. The trench extends across the spell's area, and the separated water forms a wall to either side. The trench remains until the spell ends or you choose a different effect. The water then slowly fills in the trench over the course of the next round until the normal water level is restored.

***Redirect Flow.*** You cause flowing water in the area to move in a direction you choose, even if the water has to flow over obstacles, up walls, or in other unlikely directions. The water in the area moves as you direct it, but once it moves beyond the spell's area, it resumes its flow based on the terrain conditions. The water continues to move in the direction you chose until the spell ends or you choose a different effect.

***Whirlpool.*** This effect requires a body of water at least 50 feet square and 25 feet deep. You cause a whirlpool to form in the center of the area.
