The whirlpool forms a vortex that is 5 feet wide at the base, up to 50 feet wide at the top, and 25 feet tall. Any creature or object in the water and within 25 feet of the vortex is pulled 10 feet toward it. A creature can swim away from the vortex by making a Strength (Athletics) check against your spell save DC.

When a creature enters the vortex for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it must make a strength saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 2d8 bludgeoning damage and is caught in the vortex until the spell ends. On a successful save, the creature takes half damage, and isn't caught in the vortex. A creature caught in the vortex can use its action to try to swim away from the vortex as described above, but has disadvantage on the Strength (Athletics) check to do so.
The first time each turn that an object enters the vortex, the object takes 2d8 bludgeoning damage; this damage occurs each round it remains in the vortex.
material_en: A drop of water and a pinch of dust.

name: 操控天气
desc: 你在5英里半径的区域内控制天气。你必须在户外才能施放该法术。改变当前天气条件需要1d4×10分钟，具体时间取决于DM的裁定。
你可以改变降水、温度和风的条件。例如，你可以将晴朗的天气变成下雨，将温暖的天气变成寒冷，或将平静的天气变成强风。你可以在一个区域内改变天气条件，但你不能创造出该气候不可能的天气条件（例如在沙漠中创造暴风雪）。
当法术结束时，天气逐渐恢复正常，恢复正常所需的时间与改变天气所需的时间相同。
material: 一些燃烧的香薰和一点点水和泥土。
desc_en: You take control of the weather within 5 miles of you for the duration. You must be outdoors to cast this spell. Moving to a place where you don't have a clear path to the sky ends the spell early.

When you cast the spell, you change the current weather conditions, which are determined by the GM based on the climate and season. You can change precipitation, temperature, and wind. It takes 1d4 x 10 minutes for the new conditions to take effect. Once they do so, you can change the conditions again. When the spell ends, the weather gradually returns to normal.
When you change the weather conditions, find a current condition on the following tables and change its stage by one, up or down. When changing the wind, you can change its direction.
##### Precipitation
| Stage | Condition |
| 1 | Clear |
| 2 | Light clouds |
| 3 | Overcast or ground fog |
| 4 | Rain, hail, or snow |
| 5 | Torrential rain, driving hail, or blizzard |
##### Temperature
| Stage | Condition |
| 1 | Unbearable heat |
| 2 | Hot |
| 3 | Warm |
| 4 | Cool |
| 5 | Cold |
| 6 | Arctic cold |
##### Wind
| Stage | Condition |
| 1 | Calm |
| 2 | Moderate wind |
| 3 | Strong wind |
| 4 | Gale |
| 5 | Storm |
material_en: Burning incense and bits of earth and wood mixed in water.

name: 法术反制
desc: 你试图打断一个正在施法的生物。该生物在其施法时必须在射程内。如果该生物正在施放3环或更低法术，其法术失败，没有任何效果。如果该生物正在施放4环或更高法术，你进行一个施法能力检定对抗DC等于10+该法术的环阶。检定成功则该生物的法术失败，没有任何效果。
higher_level: 当你使用4环或更高法术位施放该法术时，被自动打断的法术的环阶上限增加1，每比3环高1环。
casting_time: 1反应，当一个生物在60尺范围内施法时
desc_en: You attempt to interrupt a creature in the process of casting a spell. If the creature is casting a spell of 3rd level or lower, its spell fails and has no effect. If it is casting a spell of 4th level or higher, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The DC equals 10 + the spell's level. On a success, the creature's spell fails and has no effect.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the interrupted spell has no effect if its level is less than or equal to the level of the spell slot you used.

name: 造粮术
desc: 你在地面上创造出45磅的食物和30加仑的水，足够供15个类人生物或5匹坐骑食用24小时。食物很平淡但营养丰富，24小时后会腐烂。水是干净的，不会变质。
desc_en: You create 45 pounds of food and 30 gallons of water on the ground or in containers within range, enough to sustain up to fifteen humanoids or five steeds for 24 hours. The food is bland but nourishing, and spoils if uneaten after 24 hours. The water is clean and doesn't go bad.

name: 创造亡灵
desc: 你可以将最多三个中型或小型类人生物的尸体变成食尸鬼。这些尸体必须距离彼此在10尺内。每个食尸鬼遵守你的口头命令。
在任何一个24小时周期内，只要食尸鬼在60尺范围内，你可以使用一个动作来精神控制你创造的任何食尸鬼（如果你控制多个食尸鬼，你可以同时控制其中任何一个或全部）。你决定该食尸鬼在其下一回合将采取什么动作以及将移动到哪里，或者你可以发出一个一般性命令，例如守卫某个房间或走廊。如果你没有发出命令，该食尸鬼只会在被敌对生物攻击时自卫。一旦接到命令，该食尸鬼会继续执行该任务直到完成。
该生物在你的控制下维持24小时，之后它将不再服从你给出的任何命令。为了在另一个24小时内维持对该生物的控制，你必须在当前24小时期限结束前再次对该生物施放此法术。这种对该法术的使用会重新确立你对最多四个你用此法术创造的食尸鬼的控制，而不是创造新的食尸鬼。
higher_level: 当你使用7环法术位施放该法术时，你可以将尸体变成妖鬼。
当你使用8环法术位施放该法术时，你可以将尸体变成幽灵或尸妖。
当你使用9环法术位施放该法术时，你可以将尸体变成木乃伊。
material: 一个装满墓地泥土的陶罐、一个装满咸水的陶罐，以及一个价值至少150gp的、属于每个尸体的尸体部位。
desc_en: You can cast this spell only at night. Choose up to three corpses of Medium or Small humanoids within range. Each corpse becomes a ghoul under your control. (The GM has game statistics for these creatures.)

As a bonus action on each of your turns, you can mentally command any creature you animated with this spell if the creature is within 120 feet of you (if you control multiple creatures, you can command any or all of them at the same time, issuing the same command to each one). You decide what action the creature will take and where it will move during its next turn, or you can issue a general command, such as to guard a particular chamber or corridor. If you issue no commands, the creature only defends itself against hostile creatures. Once given an order, the creature continues to follow it until its task is complete.

The creature is under your control for 24 hours, after which it stops obeying any command you have given it. To maintain control of the creature for another 24 hours, you must cast this spell on the creature before the current 24-hour period ends. This use of the spell reasserts your control over up to three creatures you have animated with this spell, rather than animating new ones.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a 7th-level spell slot, you can animate or reassert control over four ghouls. When you cast this spell using an 8th-level spell slot, you can animate or reassert control over five ghouls or two ghasts or wights. When you cast this spell using a 9th-level spell slot, you can animate or reassert control over six ghouls, three ghasts or wights, or two mummies.
material_en: One clay pot filled with grave dirt, one clay pot filled with brackish water, and one 150 gp black onyx stone for each corpse.

name: 造水术/枯水术
desc: 你创造或摧毁水。
***创造水。***你在一个你选择的、你能看见的、射程内的开放容器内创造最多10加仑干净的水。或者以喷溅的形式在范围内制造最多30尺的立方体范围的雨，熄灭区域内的明火。
***摧毁水。***你摧毁一个你能看见的、射程内的开放容器内的最多10加仑水。或者你摧毁范围内最多30尺立方体的雾气。
higher_level: 当你使用2环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你创造或摧毁的水量增加10加仑，或立方体的尺寸增加5尺，每比1环高1环就增加一次。
material: 一滴雨水和一粒谷物的种子。
desc_en: You either create or destroy water.
***Create Water.*** You create up to 10 gallons of clean water within range in an open container. Alternatively, the water falls as rain in a 30-foot cube within range.
***Destroy Water.*** You destroy up to 10 gallons of water in an open container within range. Alternatively, you destroy fog in a 30-foot cube within range.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you create or destroy 10 additional gallons of water, or the size of the cube increases by 5 feet, for each slot level above 1st.
material_en: A drop of water if creating water, or a few grains of sand if destroying it.

name: 造物术
desc: 你从阴影物质中拉出一个非活体的物体。该物体必须是你在射程内能看到的，由植物材料、植物材料、石头、水晶、金属或其他类似材料制成。该物体的尺寸最大为5尺立方。
该物体持续存在的时间取决于其材料：植物材料持续1天，石料或水晶持续12小时，金属持续1小时。
higher_level: 当你使用6环或更高法术位施放该法术时，立方尺寸每比5环高1环就增加5尺。
material: 一小块与你计划创造的物品同类型的物质。
desc_en: You pull wisps of shadow material from the Shadowfell to create a nonliving object of vegetable matter within range: soft goods, rope, wood, or something similar. You can also use this spell to create mineral objects such as stone, crystal, or metal. The object created must be no larger than a 5-foot cube, and the object must be of a form and material that you have seen before.
The duration depends on the object's material. If the object is composed of multiple materials, use the shortest duration.
| Material | Duration |
| Vegetable matter | 1 day |
| Stone or crystal | 12 hours |
| Precious metals | 1 hour |
| Gems | 10 minutes |
| Adamantine or mithral | 1 minute |
Using any material created by this spell as another spell's material component causes that spell to fail.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the cube increases by 5 feet for each slot level above 5th.
material_en: A tiny piece of matter of the same type of the item you plan to create.

name: 疗伤术
desc: 一个你触碰的生物恢复生命值，恢复量为1d8+你的施法能力调整值。该法术对不死生物和构装生物无效。
higher_level: 当你使用2环或更高法术位施放该法术时，治疗量每比1环高1环就增加1d8。
desc_en: A creature you touch regains a number of hit points equal to 1d8 + your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on undead or constructs.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the healing increases by 1d8 for each slot level above 1st.

name: 舞光术
desc: 你在射程内创造出最多四个火炬大小的光源，使它们看起来像灯笼、火把或你指定的发光的球体，每个都悬浮在空中。或者，你也可以将四个光源合并为一个中型生物大小的发光人形模糊形态。无论哪种形式，每个光源在持续时间内发出微光。
作为一个附赠动作，在你的回合，你可以移动这些光源，每个最多60尺，到射程内的任何地点。每个光源必须与其他光源相距至少20尺，并且必须在你120尺范围内。
material: A bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm.
desc_en: You create up to four torch-sized lights within range, making them appear as torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs that hover in the air for the duration. You can also combine the four lights into one glowing vaguely humanoid form of Medium size. Whichever form you choose, each light sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius.

As a bonus action on your turn, you can move the lights up to 60 feet to a new spot within range. A light must be within 20 feet of another light created by this spell, and a light winks out if it exceeds the spell's range.
material_en: A bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm.

name: 黑暗术
desc: 魔法黑暗从你选择的一点在射程内扩散，填满15尺半径的球体，直到法术结束。黑暗会绕过拐角。非魔法光源无法照亮该区域，低级魔法光源也无法照亮。
该区域内完全黑暗。有正常视觉的生物无法看到任何东西，依赖视觉的生物在此区域进行的攻击检定和感知检定上具有劣势。
material: 蝙蝠毛皮和一滴沥青或一小块煤。
desc_en: Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 15-foot-radius sphere for the duration. The darkness spreads around corners. A creature with darkvision can't see through this darkness, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it.

If the point you choose is on an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the darkness emanates from the object and moves with it. Completely covering the source of the darkness with an opaque object, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the darkness.
If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell that created the light is dispelled.
material_en: Bat fur and a drop of pitch or piece of coal.

name: 黑暗视觉
desc: 你触碰的一个自愿生物在持续时间内获得黑暗视觉，范围为60尺。
material: 一点干胡萝卜或一块玛瑙。
desc_en: You touch a willing creature to grant it the ability to see in the dark. For the duration, that creature has darkvision out to a range of 60 feet.
material_en: Either a pinch of dried carrot or an agate.

name: 昼明术
desc: 你触碰的一个物体发出60尺半径的明亮光芒，以及其外额外60尺的微光。该光为阳光。该光持续到法术结束，或者你可以解散它（无需动作）。完全覆盖被触碰物体的任何不透明材料都会阻挡该光。
desc_en: A 60-foot-radius sphere of light spreads out from a point you choose within range. The sphere is bright light and sheds dim light for an additional 60 feet.

If you chose a point on an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the light shines from the object and moves with it. Completely covering the affected object with an opaque object, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the light.
If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of darkness created by a spell of 3rd level or lower, the spell that created the darkness is dispelled.

name: 防死结界
desc: 你触碰一个生物，赋予它免受死亡的保护。第一次目标降至0生命值（而不是直接死亡）或受到使其直接死亡的效果时，目标改为降至1生命值，然后该法术结束。
如果该法术仍在生效时目标受到某种不需要豁免的效果影响，它不会死亡，但该法术结束。
desc_en: You touch a creature and grant it a measure of protection from death.
The first time the target would drop to 0 hit points as a result of taking damage, the target instead drops to 1 hit point, and the spell ends.

If the spell is still in effect when the target is subjected to an effect that would kill it instantaneously without dealing damage, that effect is instead negated against the target, and the spell ends.

name: 延迟爆裂火球
desc: 一个直径1寸的黄色光球从你指向的手指射出，在你选择的射程内一点停留并在法术持续时间内发光。在法术结束前的任何时候，你可以使用你的动作导致光球爆裂，或者如果你没有在10分钟内这样做，它会自动爆裂。
光球爆裂时，每个在20尺半径球体内的生物必须进行敏捷豁免。豁免失败者受到12d6火焰伤害，豁免成功者伤害减半。
如果你在1轮或更短时间内结束该法术，该基础伤害为12d6。如果你等待2轮，伤害为13d6；如果你等待3轮，伤害为14d6；以此类推，最多10轮，届时伤害为21d6。
higher_level: 当你使用8环或更高法术位施放该法术时，基础伤害每比7环高1环就增加1d6。
material: 一颗小珠子，由混合了少量硫磺的槲寄生制成。
desc_en: A beam of yellow light flashes from your pointing finger, then condenses to linger at a chosen point within range as a glowing bead for the duration. When the spell ends, either because your concentration is broken or because you decide to end it, the bead blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame that spreads around corners. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a dexterity saving throw. A creature takes fire damage equal to the total accumulated damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
The spell's base damage is 12d6. If at the end of your turn the bead has not yet detonated, the damage increases by 1d6.

If the glowing bead is touched before the interval has expired, the creature touching it must make a dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the spell ends immediately, causing the bead to erupt in flame. On a successful save, the creature can throw the bead up to 40 feet. When it strikes a creature or a solid object, the spell ends, and the bead explodes.
The fire damages objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 8th level or higher, the base damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 7th.
material_en: A tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur.

name: 半位面
desc: 你创造一个门，连接到一个小房间，位于某个异次元空间中。门出现在你前方5尺内的未占据空间中，垂直于地面，持续1分钟或直到你使用动作解散它。门是微光，高约8尺，宽约5尺。只有你能使用该门，且只能连接到由该法术创造的半位面。
当你穿过门时，你出现在半位面中的一个空房间里，房间是30尺的立方体。房间里黑暗，充满了空气。你可以决定半位面的一般布局，但不能改变其基本结构。半位面在法术结束或门关闭后仍然存在，但只能通过其他方式（如位面转移）访问。
如果你在同一地点重复施放此法术，你会重新连接到同一个半位面。如果你施放该法术时有其他生物在半位面内，他们会被困在里面。
desc_en: You create a shadowy door on a flat solid surface that you can see within range. The door is large enough to allow Medium creatures to pass through unhindered. When opened, the door leads to a demiplane that appears to be an empty room 30 feet in each dimension, made of wood or stone. When the spell ends, the door disappears, and any creatures or objects inside the demiplane remain trapped there, as the door also disappears from the other side.

Each time you cast this spell, you can create a new demiplane, or have the shadowy door connect to a demiplane you created with a previous casting of this spell. Additionally, if you know the nature and contents of a demiplane created by a casting of this spell by another creature, you can have the shadowy door connect to its demiplane instead.

name: 侦测善恶
desc: 在持续时间内，你知道30尺范围内是否有畸变怪、天界生物、元素生物、妖精、恶魔或亡灵，以及哪里有属于这些类别的生物。你还知道范围内是否有被祝圣或亵渎的地点或物品。
该法术可以被大多数阻挡侦测魔法的屏障阻挡，例如1尺厚的石头、1寸厚的普通金属、铅薄片或3尺厚的木头或泥土。
desc_en: For the duration, you know if there is an aberration, celestial, elemental, fey, fiend, or undead within 30 feet of you, as well as where the creature is located. Similarly, you know if there is a place or object within 30 feet of you that has been magically consecrated or desecrated.
The spell can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 feet of wood or dirt.

name: 侦测魔法
desc: 在持续时间内，你感知30尺范围内魔法的存在。如果你以这种方式感知到魔法，你可以使用你的动作看到一道微弱的灵光环绕任何你能看见的、带有魔法的生物或物体，并了解其所属的魔法学派（如果有）。
该法术可以穿透大多数障碍物，但被1尺厚的石头、1寸厚的普通金属、铅薄片或3尺厚的木头或泥土阻挡。
desc_en: For the duration, you sense the presence of magic within 30 feet of you. If you sense magic in this way, you can use your action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears magic, and you learn its school of magic, if any.
The spell can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 feet of wood or dirt.

name: 侦测毒素和疾病
desc: 在持续时间内，你可以感知并定位30尺范围内的毒素、有毒生物和疾病。你还可以识别每个毒素、毒物或疾病的类型。
该法术可以穿透大多数障碍物，但被1尺厚的石头、1寸厚的普通金属、铅薄片或3尺厚的木头或泥土阻挡。
material: 一片红豆杉叶。
desc_en: For the duration, you can sense the presence and location of poisons, poisonous creatures, and diseases within 30 feet of you. You also identify the kind of poison, poisonous creature, or disease in each case.
The spell can penetrate most barriers, but it is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 feet of wood or dirt.
material_en: A yew leaf.

name: 侦测思想
desc: 在持续时间内，你可以阅读你施法时射程内你能看见的一个生物的思想，或者你使用该动作探测时你能看见的一个生物的思想。你最初了解其表面的思想——它此刻正在想什么。你可以使用你的动作将探测深入到其思想深处，或者将注意力转移到射程内的另一个生物身上。
当你深入探测一个生物的思想时，目标必须进行感知豁免。如果豁免失败，你可以洞察其推理（如果有）、其情绪状态以及其心中所想的东西（例如它正在守护的某件大型而令人生畏的东西）。成功时，法术结束。目标知道你在探测其思想，除非你使用你的动作将探测转移回表面思想。
一个有智力3或更低，或不会语言的生物不受该法术影响。
material: 一个价值至少100gp的铜币。
desc_en: For the duration, you can read the thoughts of certain creatures. When you cast the spell and as your action on each turn until the spell ends, you can focus your mind on any one creature that you can see within 30 feet of you. If the creature you choose has an Intelligence of 3 or lower or doesn't speak any language, the creature is unaffected.

You initially learn the surface thoughts of the creature - what is most on its mind in that moment. As an action, you can either shift your attention to another creature's thoughts or attempt to probe deeper into the same creature's mind. If you probe deeper, the target must make a Wisdom saving throw. If it fails, you gain insight into its reasoning (if any), its emotional state, and something that looms large in its mind (such as something it worries over, loves, or hates). If it succeeds, the spell ends. Either way, the target knows that you are probing into its mind, and unless you shift your attention to another creature's thoughts, the creature can use its action on its turn to make an Intelligence check contested by your Intelligence check; if it succeeds, the spell ends.
Questions verbally directed at the target creature naturally shape the course of its thoughts, so this spell is particularly effective as part of an interrogation.

You can also use this spell to detect the presence of thinking creatures you can't see. When you cast the spell or as your action during the duration, you can search for thoughts within 30 feet of you. The spell can penetrate barriers, but 2 feet of rock, 2 inches of any metal other than lead, or a thin sheet of lead blocks you. You can't detect a creature with an Intelligence of 3 or lower or one that doesn't speak any language.
Once you detect the presence of a creature in this way, you can read its thoughts for the rest of the duration as described above, even if you can't see it, but it must still be within range.
material_en: A copper coin.

name: 次元门
desc: 你从当前位置传送到射程内的任何其他位置。你可以携带一个自愿生物，前提是该生物体型不超过你且携带的装备不超过其负重。
如果你选择的地点已被占据，你和与你同行的生物受到4d6力场伤害，并且法术将你传送到最近的未占据空间。
desc_en: You teleport yourself from your current location to any other spot within range. You arrive at exactly the spot desired. It can be a place you can see, one you can visualize, or one you can describe by stating distance and direction, such as "200 feet straight downward" or "upward to the northwest at a 45-degree angle, 300 feet."

You can bring along objects as long as their weight doesn't exceed what you can carry. You can also bring one willing creature of your size or smaller who is carrying gear up to its carrying capacity. The creature must be within 5 feet of you when you cast this spell.
If you would arrive in a place already occupied by an object or a creature, you and any creature traveling with you each take 4d6 force damage, and the spell fails to teleport you.

name: 易容术
desc: 你让自己——包括你的衣服、护甲、武器和其他你身上携带的物品——看起来与真实形态不同，直到法术结束或直到你使用你的动作解除它。你可以看起来矮1尺或高1尺，可以看起来胖一点或瘦一点。你不能改变你的体型，因此人类变形者仍然有人类的基本形态。该幻术在视觉检查下无法被辨别，但物理互动会揭示它是幻象，因为物体可以穿过它。
desc_en: You make yourself--including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person--look different until the spell ends or until you use your action to dismiss it. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller and can appear thin, fat, or in between. You can't change your body type, so you must adopt a form that has the same basic arrangement of limbs. Otherwise, the extent of the illusion is up to you.

The changes wrought by this spell fail to hold up to physical inspection. For example, if you use this spell to add a hat to your outfit, objects pass through the hat, and anyone who touches it would feel nothing or would feel your head and hair. If you use this spell to appear thinner than you are, the hand of someone who reaches out to touch you would bump into you while it was seemingly still in midair.
To discern that you are disguised, a creature can use its action to inspect your appearance and must succeed on an Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC.

name: 解离术
desc: 一道细长的绿光从你伸出的手指射向射程内你能看见的目标。目标可以是生物、物体或魔法力场创造物，例如力场墙创造的墙。
被该法术瞄准的生物必须进行敏捷豁免。豁免失败者受到10d6+40力场伤害。如果此伤害将目标降至0生命值，它将被解离。
被解离的生物以及它所穿戴和携带的一切物品（除了魔法物品）都会变成一堆细腻的灰色尘埃。该生物只能通过完全复生术或祈愿术才能复活。
该法术自动解离大型或更小的非魔法物体或魔法力场创造物。如果目标是巨型或更大的物体或力场创造物，该法术会解离其中10尺立方的部分。魔法物品不受该法术影响。
higher_level: 当你使用7环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害每比6环高1环就增加3d6。
material: A lodestone and a pinch of dust.
desc_en: A thin green ray springs from your pointing finger to a target that you can see within range. The target can be a creature, an object, or a creation of magical force, such as the wall created by wall of force.

A creature targeted by this spell must make a dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the target takes 10d6 + 40 force damage. If this damage reduces the target to 0 hit points, it is disintegrated.

A disintegrated creature and everything it is wearing and carrying, except magic items, are reduced to a pile of fine gray dust. The creature can be restored to life only by means of a true resurrection or a wish spell.

This spell automatically disintegrates a Large or smaller nonmagical object or a creation of magical force. If the target is a Huge or larger object or creation of force, this spell disintegrates a 10-foot-cube portion of it. A magic item is unaffected by this spell.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 7th level or higher, the damage increases by 3d6 for each slot level above 6th.
material_en: A lodestone and a pinch of dust.

name: 驱散善恶
desc: 你在你身边环绕着仁慈的能量，可以保护你免受天界生物、元素生物、精类生物、恶魔和亡灵的伤害。在法术持续时间内，这些生物在对你进行的攻击检定上具有劣势。
你可以使用动作来结束以下效应之一：对生物的恐惧或魅惑，或将天界生物、元素生物、精类生物、恶魔或亡灵送回其原位面（如果它失败一次魅力豁免）。
material: 圣水和银铁。

dc.desc: The creature must succeed on a charisma saving throw or be sent back to its home plane (if it isn't there already)

desc_en: Shimmering energy surrounds and protects you from fey, undead, and creatures originating from beyond the Material Plane. For the duration, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead have disadvantage on attack rolls against you.
You can end the spell early by using either of the following special functions.

***Break Enchantment.*** As your action, you touch a creature you can reach that is charmed, frightened, or possessed by a celestial, an elemental, a fey, a fiend, or an undead. The creature you touch is no longer charmed, frightened, or possessed by such creatures.

***Dismissal.*** As your action, make a melee spell attack against a celestial, an elemental, a fey, a fiend, or an undead you can reach. On a hit, you attempt to drive the creature back to its home plane. The creature must succeed on a charisma saving throw or be sent back to its home plane (if it isn't there already). If they aren't on their home plane, undead are sent to the Shadowfell, and fey are sent to the Feywild.
material_en: Holy water or powdered silver and iron.

name: 解除魔法
desc: 选择射程内一个生物、物体或魔法效应。任何3环或更低环阶的法术在该目标上结束。对于每个4环或更高环阶的法术在该目标上，你进行一次施法能力检定对抗DC等于10+该法术的环阶。检定成功则该法术结束。
higher_level: 当你使用4环或更高法术位施放该法术时，被自动解除的法术的环阶上限增加1，每比3环高1环。
desc_en: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect within range. Any spell of 3rd level or lower on the target ends. For each spell of 4th level or higher on the target, make an ability check using your spellcasting ability. The DC equals 10 + the spell's level. On a successful check, the spell ends.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, you automatically end the effects of a spell on the target if the spell's level is equal to or less than the level of the spell slot you used.

name: 预言术
desc: 通过祭祀或类似仪式，你收到关于一个具体目标、事件或活动的预言。预言可能有隐晦的表达。
material: 价值至少25gp的熏香和用于仪式祭坛的合适的祭品，具体取决于你的宗教传统。
desc_en: Your magic and an offering put you in contact with a god or a god's servants. You ask a single question concerning a specific goal, event, or activity to occur within 7 days. The GM offers a truthful reply. The reply might be a short phrase, a cryptic rhyme, or an omen.
The spell doesn't take into account any possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the casting of additional spells or the loss or gain of a companion.

If you cast the spell two or more times before finishing your next long rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get a random reading. The GM makes this roll in secret.
material_en: Incense and a sacrificial offering appropriate to your religion, together worth at least 25gp, which the spell consumes.

name: 神恩术
desc: 你的祈祷赋予你神圣的力量。在法术结束前的第一次武器攻击命中时，目标额外受到1d4光耀伤害。
desc_en: Your prayer empowers you with divine radiance. Until the spell ends, your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage on a hit.

name: 神圣真言
desc: 你发出一个神圣的词，充满了创造原始宇宙的力量。选择射程内你能看见的任意数量的生物。每个目标必须成功通过魅力豁免，否则受到以下效果影响：
生命值50或更少：耳聋10分钟
生命值40或更少：耳聋和失明1小时
生命值30或更少：耳聋、失明、震慑1小时
生命值20或更少：立即死亡
此外，如果目标是天界生物、元素生物、精类生物或邪魔且未能通过豁免，它必须立即返回其原属位面。

dc.desc: On a failed save, a creature suffers an effect based on its current hit points.

desc_en: You utter a divine word, imbued with the power that shaped the world at the dawn of creation. Choose any number of creatures you can see within range. Each creature that can hear you must make a Charisma saving throw. On a failed save, a creature suffers an effect based on its current hit points:
- 50 hit points or fewer: deafened for 1 minute
- 40 hit points or fewer: deafened and blinded for 10 minutes
- 30 hit points or fewer: blinded, deafened, and stunned for 1 hour
- 20 hit points or fewer: killed instantly

Regardless of its current hit points, a celestial, an elemental, a fey, or a fiend that fails its save is forced back to its plane of origin (if it isn't there already) and can't return to your current plane for 24 hours by any means short of a wish spell.

name: 支配野兽
desc: 你尝试魅惑射程内你能看到的一个野兽。它必须成功通过一次感知豁免，否则在法术持续时间内被你魅惑。如果你或你友好的同伴正在与目标战斗，目标在豁免上具有优势。
只要目标被魅惑，你与它有心灵感应联系，只要你们在同一位面上。你可以使用动作对该生物进行绝对精确的精神控制，直到你的下一回合结束。该生物只采取你选择的动作，不做任何你不允许的事情。
higher_level: 当你使用5环法术位施放该法术时，持续时间变为最长10分钟。当你使用6环法术位施放时，持续时间变为最长1小时。当你使用7环或更高法术位施放时，持续时间变为最长8小时。
desc_en: You attempt to beguile a creature that you can see within range. It must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration. If you or creatures that are friendly to you are fighting it, it has advantage on the saving throw.

While the creature is charmed, you have a telepathic link with it as long as the two of you are on the same plane of existence. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the creature while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as "Attack that creature," "Run over there," or "Fetch that object." If the creature completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itself to the best of its ability.

You can use your action to take total and precise control of the target. Until the end of your next turn, the creature takes only the actions you choose, and doesn't do anything that you don't allow it to do. During this time, you can also cause the creature to use a reaction, but this requires you to use your own reaction as well. Each time the target takes damage, it makes a new wisdom saving throw against the spell. If the saving throw succeeds, the spell ends.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell with a 9th level spell slot, the duration is concentration, up to 8 hours.

name: 支配怪物
desc: 你尝试魅惑一个你能看到的生物。它必须成功通过感知豁免，否则被你魅惑，持续法术持续时间。如果你或你的同伴正在与目标战斗，它在该豁免上具有优势。
被魅惑的目标在你控制下，你们之间可以分享心灵感应交流。目标会尽其所能地执行你的口头或心灵感应命令。你可以使用动作来完全控制目标，直到你下一回合结束。在这段时间内，该生物只能执行你选择执行的动作，不能做任何你不允许的事情。
每次目标受到伤害时，它可以进行一次新的感知豁免来对抗该法术。
higher_level: 当你使用9环法术位施放该法术时，持续时间最长为8小时。

dc.desc: On failure, the creature is charmed by you for the duration.

desc_en: You attempt to beguile a creature that you can see within range. It must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration. If you or creatures that are friendly to you are fighting it, it has advantage on the saving throw.

While the creature is charmed, you have a telepathic link with it as long as the two of you are on the same plane of existence. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the creature while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as "Attack that creature," "Run over there," or "Fetch that object." If the creature completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itself to the best of its ability.

You can use your action to take total and precise control of the target. Until the end of your next turn, the creature takes only the actions you choose, and doesn't do anything that you don't allow it to do. During this time, you can also cause the creature to use a reaction, but this requires you to use your own reaction as well.
Each time the target takes damage, it makes a new wisdom saving throw against the spell. If the saving throw succeeds, the spell ends.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell with a 9th-level spell slot, the duration is concentration, up to 8 hours.

name: 支配人类
desc: 你尝试魅惑射程内你能看到的一个类人生物。它必须成功通过一次感知豁免，否则在法术持续时间内被你魅惑。如果你或你友好的同伴正在与目标战斗，目标在豁免上具有优势。
只要目标被魅惑，你与它有心灵感应联系，只要你们在同一位面上。你可以使用动作对该生物进行绝对精确的精神控制，直到你的下一回合结束。该生物只采取你选择的动作，不做任何你不允许的事情。
higher_level: 当你使用6环法术位施放该法术时，持续时间变为最长10分钟。当你使用7环法术位施放时，持续时间变为最长1小时。当你使用8环或更高法术位施放时，持续时间变为最长8小时。

dc.desc: Each time the target takes damage, it makes a new wisdom saving throw against the spell. If the saving throw succeeds, the spell ends.

desc_en: You attempt to beguile a humanoid that you can see within range. It must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the duration. If you or creatures that are friendly to you are fighting it, it has advantage on the saving throw.

While the target is charmed, you have a telepathic link with it as long as the two of you are on the same plane of existence. You can use this telepathic link to issue commands to the creature while you are conscious (no action required), which it does its best to obey. You can specify a simple and general course of action, such as "Attack that creature," "Run over there," or "Fetch that object." If the creature completes the order and doesn't receive further direction from you, it defends and preserves itself to the best of its ability.

You can use your action to take total and precise control of the target. Until the end of your next turn, the creature takes only the actions you choose, and doesn't do anything that you don't allow it to do. During this time you can also cause the creature to use a reaction, but this requires you to use your own reaction as well.
Each time the target takes damage, it makes a new wisdom saving throw against the spell. If the saving throw succeeds, the spell ends.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a 6th-level spell slot, the duration is concentration, up to 10 minutes. When you use a 7th-level spell slot, the duration is concentration, up to 1 hour. When you use a spell slot of 8th level or higher, the duration is concentration, up to 8 hours.

name: 托梦术
desc: 该法术塑造一个生物的梦境。选择一个你已知的生物。该生物必须在你所在位面上。目标陷入睡眠后，你或一个你选择的自愿生物进入恍惚状态，作为信使出现在目标的梦中。信使可以与目标对话，并创造景观、物体和其他影像。
信使可以随时结束恍惚状态以离开梦境，但结束恍惚状态也会结束目标在该法术上的效果。
material: 一把沙、一滴墨水和一根从沉睡的鸟类身上拔下的羽毛。

dc.desc: On a failed save, echoes of the phantasmal monstrosity spawn a nightmare that lasts the duration of the target's sleep and prevents the target from gaining any benefit from that rest.

desc_en: This spell shapes a creature's dreams. Choose a creature known to you as the target of this spell. The target must be on the same plane of existence as you. Creatures that don't sleep, such as elves, can't be contacted by this spell. You, or a willing creature you touch, enters a trance state, acting as a messenger.
While in the trance, the messenger is aware of his or her surroundings, but can't take actions or move.

If the target is asleep, the messenger appears in the target's dreams and can converse with the target as long as it remains asleep, through the duration of the spell. The messenger can also shape the environment of the dream, creating landscapes, objects, and other images. The messenger can emerge from the trance at any time, ending the effect of the spell early. The target recalls the dream perfectly upon waking. If the target is awake when you cast the spell, the messenger knows it, and can either end the trance (and the spell) or wait for the target to fall asleep, at which point the messenger appears in the target's dreams.

You can make the messenger appear monstrous and terrifying to the target. If you do, the messenger can deliver a message of no more than ten words and then the target must make a wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, echoes of the phantasmal monstrosity spawn a nightmare that lasts the duration of the target's sleep and prevents the target from gaining any benefit from that rest. In addition, when the target wakes up, it takes 3d6 psychic damage.
If you have a body part, lock of hair, clipping from a nail, or similar portion of the target's body, the target makes its saving throw with disadvantage.
material_en: A handful of sand, a dab of ink, and a writing quill plucked from a sleeping bird.

name: 德鲁伊伎俩
desc: 你召唤自然之力预测未来的天气。你创造一个即时、无害的感官效应，预测你当前位置未来24小时的天气。该效应可能表现为金色光球（晴朗）、云朵（多云）、雨滴（下雨）、雪花（下雪）等。此效应持续1轮。
或者，你可以使一朵花绽放、一颗种子发芽、或一片叶子芽苞绽放。
或者，你创造一根火柴或一个篝火，立即点燃你触碰的可燃物体。
或者，你创造一个小到可以握在手中的无害感官效应，预测接下来1小时内你所在地区的天气。
desc_en: Whispering to the spirits of nature, you create one of the following effects within 'range':

- You create a tiny, harmless sensory effect that predicts what the weather will be at your location for the next 24 hours. The effect might manifest as a golden orb for clear skies, a cloud for rain, falling snowflakes for snow, and so on. This effect persists for 1 round.
- You instantly make a flower bloom, a seed pod open, or a leaf bud bloom.
- You create an instantaneous, harmless sensory effect, such as falling leaves, a puff of wind, the sound of a small animal, or the faint order of skunk. The effect must fit in a 5-foot cube.
- You instantly light or snuff out a candle, a torch, or a small campfire.

name: 地震术
desc: 你在射程内你选择的点制造出强烈震颤，持续1分钟。在持续时间内，以该点为中心、100尺半径的球形区域内的地面成为困难地形。每个在该区域内进行敏捷豁免的生物具有劣势。
区域内每个回合 roll d6 来决定什么效果发生：
1-3 震颤：该区域内的每个生物必须进行体质豁免。豁免失败者倒地。豁免成功者受到一半伤害。
4-5 裂隙：该区域内的地面出现裂隙。裂隙深1d10×10尺，宽10尺，从区域内随机一点延伸1d10×10尺。每个在裂隙区域内的生物必须进行敏捷豁免，失败则跌入裂隙。裂隙边缘需要进行敏捷（杂技）检定才能攀爬。
6 建筑倒塌：该区域内的建筑受到50点钝击伤害。如果这将其降至0生命值，建筑会倒塌。每个在建筑10尺内的生物必须进行敏捷豁免，失败则受到5d6钝击伤害，成功则伤害减半。
material: 一小块粘土、一些岩石和一些泥土。
desc_en: You create a seismic disturbance at a point on the ground that you can see within range. For the duration, an intense tremor rips through the ground in a 100-foot-radius circle centered on that point and shakes creatures and structures in contact with the ground in that area.
The ground in the area becomes difficult terrain. Each creature on the ground that is concentrating must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save, the creature's concentration is broken.

When you cast this spell and at the end of each turn you spend concentrating on it, each creature on the ground in the area must make a dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature is knocked prone.
This spell can have additional effects depending on the terrain in the area, as determined by the GM.

Fissures. Fissures open throughout the spell's area at the start of your next turn after you cast the spell. A total of 1d6 such fissures open in locations chosen by the GM. Each is 1d10 x 10 feet deep, 10 feet wide, and extends from one edge of the spell's area to the opposite side. A creature standing on a spot where a fissure opens must succeed on a dexterity saving throw or fall in. A creature that successfully saves moves with the fissure's edge as it opens.
A fissure that opens beneath a structure causes it to automatically collapse (see below).

Structures. The tremor deals 50 bludgeoning damage to any structure in contact with the ground in the area when you cast the spell and at the start of each of your turns until the spell ends. If a structure drops to 0 hit points, it collapses and potentially damages nearby creatures. A creature within half the distance of a structure's height must make a dexterity saving throw. On a failed save, the creature takes 5d6 bludgeoning damage, is knocked prone, and is buried in the rubble, requiring a DC 20 Strength (Athletics) check as an action to escape. The GM can adjust the DC higher or lower, depending on the nature of the rubble. On a successful save, the creature takes half as much damage and doesn't fall prone or become buried.
material_en: A pinch of dirt, a piece of rock, and a lump of clay.

name: 魔能爆
desc: 一束爆裂的能量从你的指尖射向射程内的一个生物。对该生物进行一次远程法术攻击。命中时，目标受到1d10力场伤害。
该法术创造多道光束，其数量在你达到更高等级时增加：5级时两道光束，11级时三道光束，17级时四道光束。你可以将这些光束指向同一个目标，也可以指向不同目标。对每个光束分别进行攻击检定。
desc_en: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 force damage. The spell creates more than one beam when you reach higher levels: two beams at 5th level, three beams at 11th level, and four beams at 17th level. You can direct the beams at the same target or at different ones. Make a separate attack roll for each beam.

name: 强化能力
desc: 你触碰的一个生物在持续时间内获得以下效应之一：
***公牛之力。***目标在力量检定和力量豁免上具有优势。
***猫之优雅。***目标在敏捷检定和敏捷豁免上具有优势。
***熊之坚韧。***目标在体质检定和体质豁免上具有优势。此外，它获得2d6临时生命值。
***狐之狡黠。***目标在智力检定和智力豁免上具有优势。
***枭之智慧。***目标在感知检定和感知豁免上具有优势。
***鹰之威仪。***目标在魅力检定和魅力豁免上具有优势。
higher_level: 当你使用3环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你可以额外指定一个生物作为目标，每比2环高2环就多指定一个。
material: 一只动物的毛皮或羽毛。
desc_en: You touch a creature and bestow upon it a magical enhancement. Choose one of the following effects; the target gains that effect until the spell ends.
***Bear's Endurance.*** The target has advantage on constitution checks. It also gains 2d6 temporary hit points, which are lost when the spell ends.
***Bull's Strength.*** The target has advantage on strength checks, and his or her carrying capacity doubles.
***Cat's Grace.*** The target has advantage on dexterity checks. It also doesn't take damage from falling 20 feet or less if it isn't incapacitated.
***Eagle's Splendor.*** The target has advantage on Charisma checks.
***Fox's Cunning.*** The target has advantage on intelligence checks.
***Owl's Wisdom.*** The target has advantage on wisdom checks.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 2nd.
material_en: Fur or a feather from a beast.

name: 放大/缩小
desc: 你使一个生物或一个你能在射程内看见且没有被其他生物携带或穿戴的物体变大或变小。目标在持续时间内受到以下效应之一：
***变大。***目标的大小加倍，在所有重量计算中重量变为八倍。目标在力量检定和力量豁免上具有优势。目标的武器也变大，使用这些武器进行的攻击额外造成1d4伤害。
***变小。***目标的大小减半，在所有重量计算中重量变为八分之一。目标在力量检定和力量豁免上具有劣势。目标的武器也变小，使用这些武器进行的攻击少造成1d4伤害（不能低于1）。
material: 一点铁粉和一点水。
desc_en: You cause a creature or an object you can see within range to grow larger or smaller for the duration. Choose either a creature or an object that is neither worn nor carried. If the target is unwilling, it can make a Constitution saving throw. On a success, the spell has no effect.
If the target is a creature, everything it is wearing and carrying changes size with it. Any item dropped by an affected creature returns to normal size at once.

***Enlarge.*** The target's size doubles in all dimensions, and its weight is multiplied by eight. This growth increases its size by one category-from Medium to Large, for example. If there isn't enough room for the target to double its size, the creature or object attains the maximum possible size in the space available. Until the spell ends, the target also has advantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. The target's weapons also grow to match its new size. While these weapons are enlarged, the target's attacks with them deal 1d4 extra damage.

***Reduce.*** The target's size is halved in all dimensions, and its weight is reduced to one-eighth of normal. This reduction decreases its size by one category-from Medium to Small, for example. Until the spell ends, the target also has disadvantage on Strength checks and Strength saving throws. The target's weapons also shrink to match its new size. While these weapons are reduced, the target's attacks with them deal 1d4 less damage (this can't reduce the damage below 1).
material_en: A pinch iron powder.

name: 纠缠术
desc: 射程内你能看见的地面上长出杂草和藤蔓。在持续时间内，20尺方格内的区域对生物来说是困难地形。
当该法术被施放时，每个在该区域内的生物必须成功通过一次力量豁免，否则被藤蔓束缚，直到法术结束。被束缚的生物可以使用其动作进行力量检定，对抗你的法术豁免DC。成功时，它挣脱束缚。
desc_en: Grasping weeds and vines sprout from the ground in a 20-foot square starting form a point within range. For the duration, these plants turn the ground in the area into difficult terrain.

A creature in the area when you cast the spell must succeed on a strength saving throw or be restrained by the entangling plants until the spell ends. A creature restrained by the plants can use its action to make a Strength check against your spell save DC. On a success, it frees itself.
When the spell ends, the conjured plants wilt away.

name: 迷惑术
desc: 你编织一串让人分心的词语，使射程内你能看见的、能听见你的、且智力为5或更高的生物着迷。每个目标必须通过一次感知豁免，否则在持续时间内对你具有劣势的感知检定。豁免成功的生物对该法术免疫1分钟。
该法术在战斗中对生物无效。
desc_en: You weave a distracting string of words, causing creatures of your choice that you can see within range and that can hear you to make a wisdom saving throw. Any creature that can't be charmed succeeds on this saving throw automatically, and if you or your companions are fighting a creature, it has advantage on the save. On a failed save, the target has disadvantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks made to perceive any creature other than you until the spell ends or until the target can no longer hear you. The spell ends if you are incapacitated or can no longer speak.

name: 灵体形态
desc: 你踏入以太位面的边界，在该位面中你会一直待到法术结束。在法术持续时间内，你可以随时使用动作结束该效果。
在以太位面时，你可以看见和听见你原来所在的位面，该位面以灰度呈现，但你看不到该位面60尺以外的东西。你只能影响或被其他以太位面生物影响。
当你离开以太位面时，你出现在你离开的地方。如果你占据另一个生物的空间，你立即被推到最近的未占据空间，并受到等于两倍你移动距离的力场伤害。
higher_level: 当你使用8环或9环法术位施放该法术时，持续时间分别为8小时和24小时。
desc_en: You step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane, in the area where it overlaps with your current plane. You remain in the Border Ethereal for the duration or until you use your action to dismiss the spell. During this time, you can move in any direction. If you move up or down, every foot of movement costs an extra foot. You can see and hear the plane you originated from, but everything there looks gray, and you can't see anything more than 60 feet away.

While on the Ethereal Plane, you can only affect and be affected by other creatures on that plane. Creatures that aren't on the Ethereal Plane can't perceive you and can't interact with you, unless a special ability or magic has given them the ability to do so.
You ignore all objects and effects that aren't on the Ethereal Plane, allowing you to move through objects you perceive on the plane you originated from.

When the spell ends, you immediately return to the plane you originated from in the spot you currently occupy. If you occupy the same spot as a solid object or creature when this happens, you are immediately shunted to the nearest unoccupied space that you can occupy and take force damage equal to twice the number of feet you are moved.
This spell has no effect if you cast it while you are on the Ethereal Plane or a plane that doesn't border it, such as one of the Outer Planes.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 8th level or higher, you can target up to three willing creatures (including you) for each slot level above 7th. The creatures must be within 10 feet of you when you cast the spell.

name: 快步撤退
desc: 当你施放该法术时，以及此后在你的每个回合中作为一个附赠动作，你可以采取疾走动作。
desc_en: This spell allows you to move at an incredible pace. When you cast this spell, and then as a bonus action on each of your turns until the spell ends, you can take the Dash action.

name: 眼魔之眼
desc: 在一分钟持续时间内，你的眼睛变得充满黑暗力量，使你能以一种新的方式影响其他生物。作为动作，选择一个你能看见且在60尺内的生物。如果目标看到你，它必须成功通过感知豁免，否则将受到你选择的一种效果影响。在后续回合中，你可以使用动作来影响另一个未受影响的目标，或者继续影响一个已经受影响的目标。
沉睡。目标陷入昏迷。该目标在你下一回合开始时醒来，或者如果它受到伤害或有人使用动作摇醒或拍打它。
恐慌。目标陷入恐慌。在每个回合中，受恐慌的目标必须使用其动作并尽可能远离你移动。受恐慌的目标不能自愿移向你或你选择的30尺内的生物。
患病。目标在攻击检定和能力检定上具有劣势，且不能执行反应。它只能每回合执行一个动作或一个附赠动作，不能同时执行两者。

dc.desc: On failure, the target can be affected by one of the following effects of your choice for the duration. [Asleep. The target falls unconscious. It wakes up if it takes any damage or if another creature uses its action to shake the sleeper awake.] [Panicked. The target is frightened of you. On each of its turns, the frightened creature must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest and shortest available route, unless there is nowhere to move. If the target moves to a place at least 60 feet away from you where it can no longer see you, this effect ends.] [Sickened. The target has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks. At the end of each of its turns, it can make another wisdom saving throw. If it succeeds, the effect ends.]

desc_en: For the spell's duration, your eyes become an inky void imbued with dread power. One creature of your choice within 60 feet of you that you can see must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or be affected by one of the following effects of your choice for the duration. On each of your turns until the spell ends, you can use your action to target another creature but can't target a creature again if it has succeeded on a saving throw against this casting of eyebite.
***Asleep.*** The target falls unconscious. It wakes up if it takes any damage or if another creature uses its action to shake the sleeper awake.

***Panicked.*** The target is frightened of you. On each of its turns, the frightened creature must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest and shortest available route, unless there is nowhere to move. If the target moves to a place at least 60 feet away from you where it can no longer see you, this effect ends.
***Sickened.*** The target has disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks. At the end of each of its turns, it can make another wisdom saving throw. If it succeeds, the effect ends.

name: 制造术
desc: 你将原材料转化为由相同材料制成的产品。例如，你可以将一堆木材制造为一座木桥、一把梯子或一艘船。材料的价值必须低于成品。由多种材料制成的物体只能使用该法术制造其主要材料。
desc_en: You convert raw materials into products of the same material. For example, you can fabricate a wooden bridge from a clump of trees, a rope from a patch of hemp, and clothes from flax or wool.

Choose raw materials that you can see within range. You can fabricate a Large or smaller object (contained within a 10-foot cube, or eight connected 5-foot cubes), given a sufficient quantity of raw material. If you are working with metal, stone, or another mineral substance, however, the fabricated object can be no larger than Medium (contained within a single 5-foot cube). The quality of objects made by the spell is commensurate with the quality of the raw materials.

Creatures or magic items can't be created or transmuted by this spell. You also can't use it to create items that ordinarily require a high degree of craftsmanship, such as jewelry, weapons, glass, or armor, unless you have proficiency with the type of artisan's tools used to craft such objects.

name: 妖火
desc: 20尺立方体内的每个物体都被蓝色、绿色或紫色的光勾勒出来（由你选择）。在持续时间内，任何未通过敏捷豁免的生物在该区域内也被光勾勒出来。在持续时间内，受影响的物体和生物发出10尺半径的微光。
任何受影响的生物或物体的攻击检定上具有劣势，任何攻击受影响生物的攻击检定上具有优势，前提是攻击者能看见它们。受影响的生物或物体无法受益于隐形。
desc_en: Each object in a 20-foot cube within range is outlined in blue, green, or violet light (your choice). Any creature in the area when the spell is cast is also outlined in light if it fails a dexterity saving throw. For the duration, objects and affected creatures shed dim light in a 10-foot radius.
Any attack roll against an affected creature or object has advantage if the attacker can see it, and the affected creature or object can't benefit from being invisible.

name: 忠诚守卫
desc: 你在射程内创造出一只幻影看门狗。看门狗隐形，对除了你之外的所有人来说无法感知。它会向你示警任何接近的小型或更大的生物（除了你指定的生物）。当有生物进入距离它30尺范围内时，它会开始大声吠叫，并且停止隐形。该生物对你和你指定的同伴是友好的。
material: 一块银哨、一小片骨头和一根绳子。
desc_en: You conjure a phantom watchdog in an unoccupied space that you can see within range, where it remains for the duration, until you dismiss it as an action, or until you move more than 100 feet away from it.

The hound is invisible to all creatures except you and can't be harmed. When a Small or larger creature comes within 30 feet of it without first speaking the password that you specify when you cast this spell, the hound starts barking loudly. The hound sees invisible creatures and can see into the Ethereal Plane. It ignores illusions.

At the start of each of your turns, the hound attempts to bite one creature within 5 feet of it that is hostile to you. The hound's attack bonus is equal to your spellcasting ability modifier + your proficiency bonus. On a hit, it deals 4d8 piercing damage.
material_en: A tiny silver whistle, a piece of bone, and a thread

name: 虚假生命
desc: 你获得1d4+4临时生命值，持续时间为法术持续时间。
higher_level: 当你使用2环或更高法术位施放该法术时，临时生命值每比1环高1环就增加5点。
material: 一小瓶烈酒或蒸馏酒精。
desc_en: Bolstering yourself with a necromantic facsimile of life, you gain 1d4 + 4 temporary hit points for the duration.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you gain 5 additional temporary hit points for each slot level above 1st.
material_en: A small amount of alcohol or distilled spirits.

name: 恐惧术
desc: 你投射出一只幻影，它是每个受术生物最可怕的噩梦。每个位于15尺锥形区域内的生物必须成功通过一次感知豁免，否则在法术持续时间内对你恐惧。被恐惧的生物每回合必须在其回合开始时进行一次体质豁免，失败则该回合剩余时间内无法移动。
material: 一根白色羽毛或一只母鸡的心脏。

dc.desc: On fail, A creature drop whatever it is holding and become frightened for the duration.

desc_en: You project a phantasmal image of a creature's worst fears. Each creature in a 30-foot cone must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or drop whatever it is holding and become frightened for the duration.

While frightened by this spell, a creature must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest available route on each of its turns, unless there is nowhere to move. If the creature ends its turn in a location where it doesn't have line of sight to you, the creature can make a wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the spell ends for that creature.
material_en: A white feather or the heart of a hen.

name: 羽落术
desc: 在持续时间内，选择最多五个在你60尺范围内的坠落生物。每个生物的坠落速度变为每轮60尺，直到法术结束。如果该生物在法术结束前落地，它不会受到坠落伤害，并且可以安全着陆。
material: 一根小羽毛或一点羽绒。
desc_en: Choose up to five falling creatures within range. A falling creature's rate of descent slows to 60 feet per round until the spell ends. If the creature lands before the spell ends, it takes no falling damage and can land on its feet, and the spell ends for that creature.
material_en: A small feather or a piece of down.

name: 弱智术
desc: 你向一个你能看到的生物发射一颗闪烁的能量球。目标必须进行智力豁免，豁免具有劣势（如果是法师、术士或吟游诗人，豁免不具劣势）。豁免失败者其智力和魅力变为1。被影响的生物不能施法、激活魔法物品、理解语言或与任何生物进行智能交流。然而，该生物可以识别其朋友、跟随他们，甚至保护他们。
在每个30天的时间周期结束时，目标可以进行一次感知豁免来结束该效果。此外，法术高等复原术、医疗术或祈愿术也可以结束该效果。
material: 一些粘土、水晶、玻璃或矿物球体。

dc.desc: The target always takes the damage. On a failed save, the creature's Intelligence and Charisma scores become 1.

desc_en: You blast the mind of a creature that you can see within range, attempting to shatter its intellect and personality. The target takes 4d6 psychic damage and must make an intelligence saving throw.

On a failed save, the creature's Intelligence and Charisma scores become 1. The creature can't cast spells, activate magic items, understand language, or communicate in any intelligible way. The creature can, however, identify its friends, follow them, and even protect them.
At the end of every 30 days, the creature can repeat its saving throw against this spell. If it succeeds on its saving throw, the spell ends.
The spell can also be ended by greater restoration, heal, or wish.
material_en: A handful of clay, crystal, glass, or mineral spheres.

name: 寻找魔宠
desc: 你获得一个为你服务的魔宠的服务。魔宠是一种天界生物、妖精或恶魔（由你选择），具有你选择的以下形态之一：蝙蝠、猫、螃蟹、青蛙（蟾蜍）、鹰、蜥蜴、章鱼、猫头鹰、毒蛇、鱼（河豚）、老鼠、渡鸦、海马、蜘蛛或鼬。
魔宠具有所选形态的统计数据，但它是天界生物、妖精或恶魔（由你选择），而不是野兽。
你的魔宠在你周围100尺范围内行动。如果你从同一个位面内可以看到或听见你的魔宠，你可以使用你的动作看到通过它的眼睛和听见它听见的声音，直到你的下个回合开始。当你这样做时，你获得该生物具有的任何特殊感官的好处，但在此期间你对你自己的感官是失明和失聪的。
当你的魔宠在100尺范围内时，你可以与它进行心灵感应交流。此外，作为一个动作，你可以让你的魔宠消失，使其进入口袋次元。或者，你可以随时解散它，永久地终止该法术。
当你的魔宠在口袋次元时，你可以随时使用你的动作将其召唤到30尺内的任何未占用空间中。
当你的魔宠降至0生命值时，它会消失，不会留下任何物理形态。它在你再次施放该法术后重新出现。
你不能同时拥有多个魔宠。如果你再次施放该法术，现有的魔宠会消失，新的魔宠取而代之。
material: 价值至少10gp的焚香和草药，在黄铜火盆中燃烧，以及价值至少25gp的雕刻精美的象牙、银或锡容器，用来容纳该魔宠。
desc_en: You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that takes an animal form you choose: bat, cat, crab, frog (toad), hawk, lizard, octopus, owl, poisonous snake, fish (quipper), rat, raven, sea horse, spider, or weasel. Appearing in an unoccupied space within range, the familiar has the statistics of the chosen form, though it is a celestial, fey, or fiend (your choice) instead of a beast.

Your familiar acts independently of you, but it always obeys your commands. In combat, it rolls its own initiative and acts on its own turn. A familiar can't attack, but it can take other actions as normal.
When the familiar drops to 0 hit points, it disappears, leaving behind no physical form. It reappears after you cast this spell again.

While your familiar is within 100 feet of you, you can communicate with it telepathically. Additionally, as an action, you can see through your familiar's eyes and hear what it hears until the start of your next turn, gaining the benefits of any special senses that the familiar has. During this time, you are deaf and blind with regard to your own senses.

As an action, you can temporarily dismiss your familiar. It disappears into a pocket dimension where it awaits your summons. Alternatively, you can dismiss it forever. As an action while it is temporarily dismissed, you can cause it to reappear in any unoccupied space within 30 feet of you.

You can't have more than one familiar at a time. If you cast this spell while you already have a familiar, you instead cause it to adopt a new form. Choose one of the forms from the above list. Your familiar transforms into the chosen creature.

Finally, when you cast a spell with a range of touch, your familiar can deliver the spell as if it had cast the spell. Your familiar must be within 100 feet of you, and it must use its reaction to deliver the spell when you cast it. If the spell requires an attack roll, you use your action modifier for the roll.
material_en: 10gp worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs that must be consumed by fire in a brass brazier.

name: 寻找坐骑
desc: 你召唤一个灵体，它具有你选择的以下形态之一：战马、矮种马、骆驼、麋鹿或獒犬。该灵体具有所选形态的统计数据，但它是天界生物、妖精或恶魔（由你选择），而不是野兽。此外，如果你的坐骑智力为5或更低，它的智力变为6，并且它能理解一种你选择的语言。
该坐骑在持续时间内为你服务。你与坐骑有直觉的连接，允许你在战斗中作为一个单位行动。你可以骑乘或下马你的坐骑，这花费5尺移动力。当你骑乘时，你不能被迫下马，除非你处于失能状态。如果你主动下马，它会在你的回合内的任何时间出现在你5尺内。
你可以与你的坐骑进行心灵感应交流，前提是你必须在1英里范围内。
desc_en: You summon a spirit that assumes the form of an unusually intelligent, strong, and loyal steed, creating a long-lasting bond with it. Appearing in an unoccupied space within range, the steed takes on a form that you choose, such as a warhorse, a pony, a camel, an elk, or a mastiff. (Your GM might allow other animals to be summoned as steeds.) The steed has the statistics of the chosen form, though it is a celestial, fey, or fiend (your choice) instead of its normal type. Additionally, if your steed has an Intelligence of 5 or less, its Intelligence becomes 6, and it gains the ability to understand one language of your choice that you speak.

Your steed serves you as a mount, both in combat and out, and you have an instinctive bond with it that allows you to fight as a seamless unit. While mounted on your steed, you can make any spell you cast that targets only you also target your steed.

When the steed drops to 0 hit points, it disappears, leaving behind no physical form. You can also dismiss your steed at any time as an action, causing it to disappear. In either case, casting this spell again summons the same steed, restored to its hit point maximum.
While your steed is within 1 mile of you, you can communicate with it telepathically.
You can't have more than one steed bonded by this spell at a time. As an action, you can release the steed from its bond at any time, causing it to disappear.

name: 寻找陷阱
desc: 你感知到120尺范围内任何陷阱的存在。该法术为"陷阱"提供的定义相当简单。任何可能对他人造成伤害或作为负面效果的突然或意外效果的东西都被视为该法术的陷阱。因此，该法术会感知到一个被警报术守护的区域或一个守卫刻纹，但它不会揭示一个自然薄弱点、不稳定的天花板，或隐藏的陷坑。
desc_en: You sense the presence of any trap within range that is within line of sight. A trap, for the purpose of this spell, includes anything that would inflict a sudden or unexpected effect you consider harmful or undesirable, which was specifically intended as such by its creator. Thus, the spell would sense an area affected by the alarm spell, a glyph of warding, or a mechanical pit trap, but it would not reveal a natural weakness in the floor, an unstable ceiling, or a hidden sinkhole.
This spell merely reveals that a trap is present. You don't learn the location of each trap, but you do learn the general nature of the danger posed by a trap you sense.

name: 寻路术
desc: 该法术让你能找到通往特定地点的最直接物理路径。在你专注于法术期间，只要你和你所前往的目的地在同一个位面上，你就会知道到那里需要走多远、朝哪个方向走，以及一路上你会遇到什么障碍。
该法术让你知道最短、最直接的自然路径。它不会考虑你可能采取的任何特殊行动，例如使用魔法物品或法术。
material: 一套占卜用具，例如骨头、象牙棒、卡牌、牙齿或雕刻的符文，价值至少100gp，以及一个来自你熟悉的地点的金属制品。
desc_en: This spell allows you to find the shortest, most direct physical route to a specific fixed location that you are familiar with on the same plane of existence. If you name a destination on another plane of existence, a destination that moves (such as a mobile fortress), or a destination that isn't specific (such as "a green dragon's lair"), the spell fails.

For the duration, as long as you are on the same plane of existence as the destination, you know how far it is and in what direction it lies. While you are traveling there, whenever you are presented with a choice of paths along the way, you automatically determine which path is the shortest and most direct route (but not necessarily the safest route) to the destination.
material_en: A set of divinatory tools--such as bones, ivory sticks, cards, teeth, or carved runes--worth 100gp and an object from the location you wish to find.

name: 死亡一指
desc: 你向一个你能看见的生物发出负能量的射线。目标必须进行体质豁免。豁免失败者受到8d8+30亡灵伤害，豁免成功者伤害减半。
被该法术杀死的类人生物将在你的下一回合开始时复活为一个被你控制的僵尸（DM提供该生物的游戏数据）。该僵尸在其回合紧随你的回合。
desc_en: You send negative energy coursing through a creature that you can see within range, causing it searing pain. The target must make a constitution saving throw. It takes 7d8 + 30 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
A humanoid killed by this spell rises at the start of your next turn as a zombie that is permanently under your command, following your verbal orders to the best of its ability.

name: 火焰箭
desc: 你向射程内的一个生物或物体投掷一束火焰。对目标进行一次远程法术攻击。命中时，目标受到1d10火焰伤害。易燃物体被该法术击中时会点燃。
该法术的伤害在你达到5级时增加1d10（变为2d10），11级时增加2d10（变为3d10），17级时增加3d10（变为4d10）。
desc_en: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage. A flammable object hit by this spell ignites if it isn't being worn or carried.
This spell's damage increases by 1d10 when you reach 5th level (2d10), 11th level (3d10), and 17th level (4d10).

name: 火焰护盾
desc: 你被火焰包围，直到法术结束。火焰为你提供明亮光照和10尺半径的微光。你可以选择火焰护盾提供温暖护盾或寒冷护盾。
温暖护盾为你提供对冷冻伤害的抗性，寒冷护盾为你提供对火焰伤害的抗性。此外，每次一个生物在5尺范围内用近战攻击命中你时，该生物受到2d8火焰伤害（温暖护盾）或2d8冷冻伤害（寒冷护盾）。
material: 一点磷或萤火虫。
desc_en: Thin and vaporous flame surround your body for the duration of the spell, radiating a bright light bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. You can end the spell using an action to make it disappear.
The flames are around you a heat shield or cold, your choice. The heat shield gives you cold damage resistance and the cold resistance to fire damage.
In addition, whenever a creature within 5 feet of you hits you with a melee attack, flames spring from the shield. The attacker then suffers 2d8 points of fire damage or cold, depending on the model.
material_en: A little phosphorus or a firefly.

name: 烈焰风暴
desc: 一团由肆虐的火焰组成的区域出现在射程内你选择的地点。该区域由最多十个10尺立方体组成，你可以以你选择的任何方式排列。每个立方体必须至少有一个面与另一个立方体相邻。
该区域内的每个生物必须进行敏捷豁免。豁免失败者受到7d10火焰伤害，豁免成功者伤害减半。
该区域的植物生命不会被该法术伤害。
desc_en: A storm made up of sheets of roaring flame appears in a location you choose within range. The area of the storm consists of up to ten 10-foot cubes, which you can arrange as you wish. Each cube must have at least one face adjacent to the face of another cube. Each creature in the area must make a dexterity saving throw. It takes 7d10 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
The fire damages objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried. If you choose, plant life in the area is unaffected by this spell.

name: 火球术
desc: 一束明亮的光线从你指向的指尖射出，射向你选择的射程内一点，并在该点爆发出火焰。每个位于20尺半径球体区域内的生物必须进行一次敏捷豁免。目标受到8d6火焰伤害，豁免成功则伤害减半。
火焰蔓延到角落。它点燃区域内未被穿戴或携带的可燃物体。
higher_level: 当你使用4环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害每比3环高1环就增加1d6。
material: 一小球蝙蝠粪便和硫磺。
desc_en: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point you choose within range and then blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame. Each creature in a 20-foot-radius sphere centered on that point must make a dexterity saving throw. A target takes 8d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.
material_en: A tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur.

name: 火焰刀
desc: 你在你一只空手周围创造出一把炽热的剑刃。直到法术结束，你可以使用你的动作进行近战法术攻击，用你的施法能力调整值代替力量或敏捷。命中时，目标受到3d6火焰伤害。
这把剑刃发出10尺半径的明亮光照，以及额外10尺的微光。
higher_level: 当你使用4环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害每比2环高2环就增加1d6。
material: 山楸叶。
desc_en: You evoke a fiery blade in your free hand. The blade is similar in size and shape to a scimitar, and it lasts for the duration. If you let go of the blade, it disappears, but you can evoke the blade again as a bonus action.
You can use your action to make a melee spell attack with the fiery blade. On a hit, the target takes 3d6 fire damage.
The flaming blade sheds bright light in a 10-foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for every two slot levels above 2nd.
material_en: Leaf of sumac.

name: 焰击术
desc: 一道垂直的火焰柱从上方轰击射程内你选择的一点。每个位于10尺半径、40尺高的圆柱区域内的生物必须进行敏捷豁免，失败受到4d6火焰伤害和4d6光耀伤害，成功则伤害减半。
higher_level: 当你使用6环或更高法术位施放该法术时，火焰伤害或光耀伤害（由你选择）每比5环高1环就增加1d6。
material: 一小撮硫。
desc_en: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens in a location you specify. Each creature in a 10-foot-radius, 40-foot-high cylinder centered on a point within range must make a dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 4d6 fire damage and 4d6 radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the fire damage or the radiant damage (your choice) increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 5th.
material_en: Pinch of sulfur.

name: 炽焰法球
desc: 在射程内你能看见的一个未被占据的空间中创造一个5尺直径的炽热火球。任何生物在火球5尺内结束其回合时受到2d6火焰伤害。你可以使用你的附赠动作将火球移动30尺。当你这样做时，你可以直接将它滚向一个小型或更小的生物，该生物必须通过一次敏捷豁免，否则受到2d6火焰伤害。
火球点燃接触到的任何易燃物体，但不会点燃被穿戴或携带的物品。
higher_level: 当你使用3环或更高法术位施放该法术时，伤害每比2环高1环就增加1d6。
material: 一小块兽脂、一小块硫磺和一点细铁粉。
desc_en: A 5-foot-diameter sphere of fire appears in an unoccupied space of your choice within range and lasts for the duration. Any creature that ends its turn within 5 feet of the sphere must make a dexterity saving throw. The creature takes 2d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

As a bonus action, you can move the sphere up to 30 feet. If you ram the sphere into a creature, that creature must make the saving throw against the sphere's damage, and the sphere stops moving this turn.

When you move the sphere, you can direct it over barriers up to 5 feet tall and jump it across pits up to 10 feet wide. The sphere ignites flammable objects not being worn or carried, and it sheds bright light in a 20-foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 2nd.
material_en: A bit of tallow, a pinch of brimstone, and a dusting of powdered iron.

name: 石化术
desc: 你尝试将你能看见的一个生物变成石头。如果目标的体型为大型或更小，它必须进行体质豁免。豁免失败者受到该法术的束缚。豁免成功者不受该法术影响。
被束缚的目标必须在其每个回合结束时进行体质豁免。如果它成功通过三次豁免，该法术结束。如果它失败三次，它变成石头，并在法术持续时间内被石化。成功和失败不需要连续；只需跟踪每个结果直到其中一种累计三次。
如果目标在变成石头时身体上被打破或损坏，当它恢复正常时，它会承受同样的伤害，但不会残缺。例如，如果目标在被石化时失去了一条手臂，它在法术结束时不会重新长出那条手臂。
material: A pinch of lime, water, and earth.

dc.desc: On a failed save, the target is restrained as its flesh begins to harden.

desc_en: You attempt to turn one creature that you can see within range into stone. If the target's body is made of flesh, the creature must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it is restrained as its flesh begins to harden. On a successful save, the creature isn't affected.

A creature restrained by this spell must make another constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully saves against this spell three times, the spell ends. If it fails its saves three times, it is turned to stone and subjected to the petrified condition for the duration. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until the target collects three of a kind.
If the creature is physically broken while petrified, it suffers from similar deformities if it reverts to its original state.
If you maintain your concentration on this spell for the entire possible duration, the creature is turned to stone until the effect is removed.
material_en: A pinch of lime, water, and earth.

name: 谭森浮碟
desc: 这个法术创造出一个圆形、水平的力场平面，直径3尺、厚1寸，漂浮在地面3尺上方。该圆盘在持续时间内保持存在，可以容纳最多500磅的重量。如果更多的重量放在圆盘上，该法术结束，圆盘上的一切掉落到地面。
该圆盘在你30尺范围内是静止的。如果你移动到离圆盘超过30尺的地方，它会跟随你，保持在你30尺范围内。它在你的回合结束时移动，以占据离你最近的位置。如果在你和你的目的地之间的直接路径上有5尺或更高的落差，该圆盘会绕过去（例如它攀上楼梯），但它不能穿越超过5尺的高度差。
material: 一滴水银。
desc_en: This spell creates a circular, horizontal plane of force, 3 feet in diameter and 1 inch thick, that floats 3 feet above the ground in an unoccupied space of your choice that you can see within range. The disk remains for the duration, and can hold up to 500 pounds. If more weight is placed on it, the spell ends, and everything on the disk falls to the ground.

The disk is immobile while you are within 20 feet of it. If you move more than 20 feet away from it, the disk follows you so that it remains within 20 feet of you. If can move across uneven terrain, up or down stairs, slopes and the like, but it can't cross an elevation change of 10 feet or more. For example, the disk can't move across a 10-foot-deep pit, nor could it leave such a pit if it was created at the bottom.
If you move more than 100 feet away from the disk (typically because it can't move around an obstacle to follow you), the spell ends.
material_en: A drop of mercury.

name: 飞行术
desc: 你触碰一个自愿生物，目标获得等于其步行速度的飞行速度，持续法术持续时间。当法术结束时，如果目标仍在空中，它会坠落，除非它能以其他方式阻止坠落。
higher_level: 当你使用4环或更高法术位施放该法术时，你每比3环高1环，就可以额外指定一个生物作为目标。
material: 一片鸟类的羽毛翅膀，任何鸟类。
desc_en: You touch a willing creature. The target gains a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft, unless it can stop the fall.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 3rd.
material_en: A wing feather from any bird.

name: 云雾术
desc: 你以射程内的一点为中心创造出20尺半径的球体范围的浓雾。在持续时间内，该区域的视野严重受阻。
higher_level: 当你使用2环或更高法术位施放该法术时，半径每比1环高1环就增加20尺。
desc_en: You create a 20-foot-radius sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for the duration or until a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses it.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the radius of the fog increases by 20 feet for each slot level above 1st.

name: 禁制术
desc: 你创造一个针对特定生物的防护，保护最多40000平方尺的地面区域。在持续时间内，生物不能通过传送或位面旅行进入该区域，或使用这些方式离开该区域。该法术以多种方式阻止位面旅行者，而且你选择的生物类型进入该区域时会受到伤害。
当你施放该法术时，你可以选择天界生物、元素生物、精类生物、邪魔或亡灵。当所选类型的生物进入法术区域时，它受到5d10光耀或亡灵伤害（由你选择）。
禁制术会阻止星界投影、橡木门、传送术以及其他类似法术的进入，这些法术被阻挡而无法进入法术区域。
material: 一撮盐和至少价值1000gp的银粉。该法术会消耗银粉。
desc_en: You create a ward against magical travel that protects up to 40,000 square feet of floor space to a height of 30 feet above the floor. For the duration, creatures can't teleport into the area or use portals, such as those created by the gate spell, to enter the area. The spell proofs the area against planar travel, and therefore prevents creatures from accessing the area by way of the Astral Plane, Ethereal Plane, Feywild, Shadowfell, or the plane shift spell.

In addition, the spell damages types of creatures that you choose when you cast it. Choose one or more of the following: celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. When a chosen creature enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the creature takes 5d10 radiant or necrotic damage (your choice when you cast this spell).
When you cast this spell, you can designate a password. A creature that speaks the password as it enters the area takes no damage from the spell.

The spell's area can't overlap with the area of another forbiddance spell. If you cast forbiddance every day for 30 days in the same location, the spell lasts until it is dispelled, and the material components are consumed on the last casting.
material_en: A sprinkling of holy water, rare incense, and powdered ruby worth at least 1,000 gp.

name: 力场牢笼
desc: 你在射程内创造出一个隐形的、由力场组成的监狱。该监狱可以是一个20尺边长的立方体，或者是一个直径20尺、高10尺的球形。任何完全位于该区域内且不是最大体型或更大的生物都会被困住。被力场牢笼困住的生物不能通过传送或位面旅行离开。该法术也能阻挡星界投影等法术的进入。
被力场牢笼困住的生物可以使用动作尝试通过进行一次魅力豁免来逃离。豁免成功者可以从该区域传送出去。如果这样做，它不能再次进入该区域。
material: 价值至少1500gp的红宝石粉尘。
desc_en: An immobile, invisible, cube-shaped prison composed of magical force springs into existence around an area you choose within range. The prison can be a cage or a solid box, as you choose.
A prison in the shape of a cage can be up to 20 feet on a side and is made from 1/2-inch diameter bars spaced 1/2 inch apart.
A prison in the shape of a box can be up to 10 feet on a side, creating a solid barrier that prevents any matter from passing through it and blocking any spells cast into or out from the area.

When you cast the spell, any creature that is completely inside the cage's area is trapped. Creatures only partially within the area, or those too large to fit inside the area, are pushed away from the center of the area until they are completely outside the area.

A creature inside the cage can't leave it by nonmagical means. If the creature tries to use teleportation or interplanar travel to leave the cage, it must first make a charisma saving throw. On a success, the creature can use that magic to exit the cage. On a failure, the creature can't exit the cage and wastes the use of the spell or effect. The cage also extends into the Ethereal Plane, blocking ethereal travel.
This spell can't be dispelled by dispel magic.
material_en: Ruby dust worth 1,500 gp.

name: 预知术
desc: 你触碰一个自愿生物，赋予其有限的预知能力。在持续时间内，目标不能受到突袭，在其他所有先攻检定上具有优势，在AC和豁免上具有+2加值，并且能看到24小时内的未来事件。
material: 一根蜂鸟的羽毛。
desc_en: You touch a willing creature and bestow a limited ability to see into the immediate future. For the duration, the target can't be surprised and has advantage on attack rolls, ability checks, and saving throws. Additionally, other creatures have disadvantage on attack rolls against the target for the duration.
This spell immediately ends if you cast it again before its duration ends.
material_en: A hummingbird feather.

name: 行动自如
desc: 你触碰一个自愿生物。在法术持续时间内，目标的移动不受困难地形影响，法术和其他魔法效应无法降低目标速度或使目标陷入麻痹或束缚。目标还可以花费5尺移动力从非魔法限制（如镣铐）中逃脱。此外，目标在水下移动时不会受到移动或攻击惩罚。
material: 一条皮绳，绑在目标的手臂上。
desc_en: You touch a willing creature. For the duration, the target's movement is unaffected by difficult terrain, and spells and other magical effects can neither reduce the target's speed nor cause the target to be paralyzed or restrained.

The target can also spend 5 feet of movement to automatically escape from nonmagical restraints, such as manacles or a creature that has it grappled. Finally, being underwater imposes no penalties on the target's movement or attacks.
material_en: A leather strap, bound around the arm or a similar appendage.

name: 冰冻法球
desc: 一个小球状的寒冷能量从指向的手指射向目标点，在射程内你选择的位置爆炸，覆盖一个60尺半径的球形区域。该区域内的每个生物必须进行体质豁免。豁免失败者受到10d6冷冻伤害，豁免成功者伤害减半。
如果冰霜法球在击中障碍物之前撞击到水体或液体，该液体会在20尺半径的圆形区域内冻结到6寸深度。液体会在1分钟内冻结，具体取决于体积和当时的温度。
直到法术结束前，你都可以选择不立即发射法球。如果你这样做，你可以使用动作来发射它。你可以在自己回合内将该法球作为正常的法术攻击，向射程内的一个生物投掷。命中时，目标受到4d6冷冻伤害。无论法球是否命中，它在撞击时都会爆裂。爆裂后，该法术结束。
higher_level: 当你使用7环或更高法术位施放该法术时，爆炸伤害每比6环高1环就增加1d6。
material: 一个小水晶球。
desc_en: A frigid globe of cold energy streaks from your fingertips to a point of your choice within range, where it explodes in a 60-foot-radius sphere. Each creature within the area must make a constitution saving throw. On a failed save, a creature takes 10d6 cold damage. On a successful save, it takes half as much damage.

If the globe strikes a body of water or a liquid that is principally water (not including water-based creatures), it freezes the liquid to a depth of 6 inches over an area 30 feet square. This ice lasts for 1 minute. Creatures that were swimming on the surface of frozen water are trapped in the ice. A trapped creature can use an action to make a Strength check against your spell save DC to break free.

You can refrain from firing the globe after completing the spell, if you wish. A small globe about the size of a sling stone, cool to the touch, appears in your hand. At any time, you or a creature you give the globe to can throw the globe (to a range of 40 feet) or hurl it with a sling (to the sling's normal range). It shatters on impact, with the same effect as the normal casting of the spell. You can also set the globe down without shattering it. After 1 minute, if the globe hasn't already shattered, it explodes.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 7th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 6th.
material_en: A small crystal sphere.

name: 气化形体
desc: 你触碰的一个自愿生物与其携带的装备一起变成一团迷雾，持续法术持续时间。在气化状态下，目标只有10尺的飞行速度，可以进入并占据敌对生物的空间，可以穿过小至1寸直径的开口或缝隙，但不能穿过水。目标对非魔法伤害具有抗性，对毒素和疾病免疫。目标在气化状态下不能说话、攻击或施法。
material: 一点樟脑和一点乳香。
desc_en: You transform a willing creature you touch, along with everything it's wearing and carrying, into a misty cloud for the duration. The spell ends if the creature drops to 0 hit points. An incorporeal creature isn't affected.

While in this form, the target's only method of movement is a flying speed of 10 feet. The target can enter and occupy the space of another creature. The target has resistance to nonmagical damage, and it has advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and constitution saving throws. The target can pass through small holes, narrow openings, and even mere cracks, though it treats liquids as though they were solid surfaces. The target can't fall and remains hovering in the air even when stunned or otherwise incapacitated.

While in the form of a misty cloud, the target can't talk or manipulate objects, and any objects it was carrying or holding can't be dropped, used, or otherwise interacted with. The target can't attack or cast spells.
material_en: A bit of gauze and a wisp of smoke.

name: 异界之门
desc: 你召唤一个通往另一个位面的传送门。门户为圆形，直径5到20尺，你可以从任意方向穿过。门户出现在你前方5尺内你能看见的一个未占据空间中。
当你施放该法术时，你可以说出特定生物的名字（不包括称号或姓氏）。如果该生物在另一个位面上，门户会出现在该生物附近（由DM决定确切位置）。
你可以使用动作打开门，使用动作可以关闭它。该传送门会一直存在，直到法术结束。
material: 价值至少5000gp的钻石。
desc_en: You conjure a portal linking an unoccupied space you can see within range to a precise location on a different plane of existence. The portal is a circular opening, which you can make 5 to 20 feet in diameter. You can orient the portal in any direction you choose. The portal lasts for the duration.

The portal has a front and a back on each plane where it appears. Travel through the portal is possible only by moving through its front. Anything that does so is instantly transported to the other plane, appearing in the unoccupied space nearest to the portal.
Deities and other planar rulers can prevent portals created by this spell from opening in their presence or anywhere within their domains.

When you cast this spell, you can speak the name of a specific creature (a pseudonym, title, or nickname doesn't work). If that creature is on a plane other than the one you are on, the portal opens in the named creature's immediate vicinity and draws the creature through it to the nearest unoccupied space on your side of the portal. You gain no special power over the creature, and it is free to act as the GM deems appropriate. It might leave, attack you, or help you.
material_en: A diamond worth at least 5,000gp.

name: 誓缚术
desc: 你对一个能听懂语言的生物下达命令，使其遭受痛苦（对该生物不造成实际伤害）如果它不服从。目标必须进行感知豁免，失败则在法术持续时间内被你魅惑。
你可以命令目标保护特定的人或地点，或执行特定的任务。如果目标不服从，它受到5d10心灵伤害。该伤害每次目标违反命令时都会发生。
higher_level: 当你使用7环或8环法术位施放该法术时，持续时间变为1年零10天。当你使用9环法术位施放时，法术持续到被法术移除诅咒、高等复原术、祈愿术或类似法术结束。
desc_en: You place a magical command on a creature that you can see within range, forcing it to carry out some service or refrain from some action or course of activity as you decide. If the creature can understand you, it must succeed on a wisdom saving throw or become charmed by you for the duration. While the creature is charmed by you, it takes 5d10 psychic damage each time it acts in a manner directly counter to your instructions, but no more than once each day. A creature that can't understand you is unaffected by the spell.
You can issue any command you choose, short of an activity that would result in certain death. Should you issue a suicidal command, the spell ends.
You can end the spell early by using an action to dismiss it. A remove curse, greater restoration, or wish spell also ends it.
higher_level_en: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 7th or 8th level, the duration is 1 year. When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 9th level, the spell lasts until it is ended by one of the spells mentioned above.

name: 遗体防腐
desc: 你触碰一具尸体或其他遗骸。在持续时间内，目标免受腐烂和无法被复活。此外，该法术有效地延长复活目标的时间限制，因为该时间是在法术持续时间内计算的。
material: 一撮槲寄生灰和每具尸体上的一个铜币，放在每具尸体的眼睛上。这些成分在法术结束时保持原样。
desc_en: You touch a corpse or other remains. For the duration, the target is protected from decay and can't become undead.

The spell also effectively extends the time limit on raising the target from the dead, since days spent under the influence of this spell don't count against the time limit of spells such as raise dead.
